changes.title: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant 插件, 使用 personal Google 认证, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome 支持, artifact/attendance exports, 和 recovery tooling 为了 already-open Meet tabs.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant plugin, with personal Google auth, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome support, artifact/attendance exports, and recovery tooling for already-open Meet tabs.

changes.title: DeepSeek V4 Flash 和 V4 Pro are 在 the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, 和 DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is 已修复 为了 follow-up 工具-call turns.
changes.rawTitle: DeepSeek V4 Flash and V4 Pro are in the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, and DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is fixed for follow-up tool-call turns.

changes.title: Talk, 语音 Call, 和 Google Meet can use realtime 语音 loops that consult the full OpenClaw Agent 为了 deeper 工具-backed answers.
changes.rawTitle: Talk, Voice Call, and Google Meet can use realtime voice loops that consult the full OpenClaw agent for deeper tool-backed answers.

changes.title: 浏览器 automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, 和 steadier tab 复用/recovery.
changes.rawTitle: Browser automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, and steadier tab reuse/recovery.

changes.title: 插件 和 模型 infrastructure is lighter at startup: static 模型 catalogs, manifest-backed 模型 rows, lazy provider dependencies, 和 external runtime-dependency repair 为了 packaged installs.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin and model infrastructure is lighter at startup: static model catalogs, manifest-backed model rows, lazy provider dependencies, and external runtime-dependency repair for packaged installs.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/工具-result transforms: 移除 the Pi-only `API.registerEmbeddedExtensionFactory(...)` compatibility 路径. Bundled 工具-result rewrites must use `API.registerAgentToolResultMiddleware(...)` 使用 `contracts.agentToolResultMiddleware` declaring the targeted harnesses, so transforms run consistently across Pi 和 Codex app-server dynamic tools. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/tool-result transforms: remove the Pi-only `api.registerEmbeddedExtensionFactory(...)` compatibility path. Bundled tool-result rewrites must use `api.registerAgentToolResultMiddleware(...)` with `contracts.agentToolResultMiddleware` declaring the targeted harnesses, so transforms run consistently across Pi and Codex app-server dynamic tools. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 添加 浏览器 WebRTC realtime 语音 sessions backed 通过 OpenAI Realtime, 使用 网关-minted ephemeral client secrets 和 `openclaw_agent_consult` handoff to the full OpenClaw Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: add browser WebRTC realtime voice sessions backed by OpenAI Realtime, with Gateway-minted ephemeral client secrets and `openclaw_agent_consult` handoff to the full OpenClaw agent.

changes.title: 插件/Google Meet: 添加 a bundled participant 插件 使用 personal Google 认证, explicit meeting URL joins, Chrome 和 Twilio realtime transports, paired-node `Chrome-node` 支持 为了 Parallels-style Chrome/BlackHole/SoX hosts, 和 full-Agent consults inside live 语音 sessions. (#70765)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: add a bundled participant plugin with personal Google auth, explicit meeting URL joins, Chrome and Twilio realtime transports, paired-node `chrome-node` support for Parallels-style Chrome/BlackHole/SoX hosts, and full-agent consults inside live voice sessions. (#70765)

changes.title: 插件/Google Meet: 添加 artifact 和 attendance workflows 为了 conference records, recordings, transcripts, smart notes, 和 participant sessions, including markdown/file output, latest-record lookup, 和 `--all-conference-records` history scans.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: add artifact and attendance workflows for conference records, recordings, transcripts, smart notes, and participant sessions, including markdown/file output, latest-record lookup, and `--all-conference-records` history scans.

changes.title: 插件/Google Meet: 添加 OAuth认证 和 浏览器-state 诊断工具/recovery flows, including `googlemeet 诊断工具 --OAuth认证` 和 `recover_current_tab`/`recover-tab` so Agent can inspect already-open Meet tabs 不适用 opening duplicates.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: add OAuth and browser-state doctor/recovery flows, including `googlemeet doctor --oauth` and `recover_current_tab`/`recover-tab` so agents can inspect already-open Meet tabs without opening duplicates.

changes.title: 插件/语音 Call: expose the shared `openclaw_agent_consult` realtime 工具 so live phone calls can ask the full OpenClaw Agent 为了 deeper/工具-backed answers.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Voice Call: expose the shared `openclaw_agent_consult` realtime tool so live phone calls can ask the full OpenClaw agent for deeper/tool-backed answers.

changes.title: 插件/语音 Call: 添加 `voicecall setup` 和 a dry-run-通过-default `voicecall smoke` 命令 so Twilio/provider readiness can be checked 之前 placing a live test call.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Voice Call: add `voicecall setup` and a dry-run-by-default `voicecall smoke` command so Twilio/provider readiness can be checked before placing a live test call.

changes.title: Providers/Google: 添加 a Gemini Live realtime 语音 provider 为了 backend 语音 Call 和 Google Meet audio bridges, 使用 bidirectional audio 和 function-call 支持.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Google: add a Gemini Live realtime voice provider for backend Voice Call and Google Meet audio bridges, with bidirectional audio and function-call support.

changes.title: Providers/Google: let Gemini TTS prepend configured `audioProfile` 和 `speakerName` prompt text 为了 reusable speech style control. Thanks @tdack.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Google: let Gemini TTS prepend configured `audioProfile` and `speakerName` prompt text for reusable speech style control. Thanks @tdack.

changes.title: 网关/VoiceClaw: 添加 a realtime brain WebSocket endpoint backed 通过 Gemini Live, 使用 owner-认证 gating 和 async OpenClaw 工具 handoff. (#70938) Thanks @yagudaev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/VoiceClaw: add a realtime brain WebSocket endpoint backed by Gemini Live, with owner-auth gating and async OpenClaw tool handoff. (#70938) Thanks @yagudaev.

changes.title: Control 界面: refine the Agent 工具 Access panel 使用 compact live-工具 chips, collapsible 工具 groups, direct per-工具 toggles, 和 clearer runtime/source provenance. (#71405) Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: refine the agent Tool Access panel with compact live-tool chips, collapsible tool groups, direct per-tool toggles, and clearer runtime/source provenance. (#71405) Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: 添加 a Steer action 在 queued messages so a 浏览器 follow-up can be injected 进入 the active run 不适用 retyping it.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: add a Steer action on queued messages so a browser follow-up can be injected into the active run without retyping it.

changes.title: 浏览器: 添加 viewport coordinate clicks 为了 managed 和 existing-session automation, plus `openclaw 浏览器 click-coords` 为了 CLI use. (#54452) Thanks @dluttz.
changes.rawTitle: Browser: add viewport coordinate clicks for managed and existing-session automation, plus `openclaw browser click-coords` for CLI use. (#54452) Thanks @dluttz.

changes.title: 浏览器: 添加 `浏览器.actionTimeoutMs` 和 use a 60s default action budget so healthy long 浏览器 waits do not fail at the client transport boundary. (#62589) Thanks @andyylin.
changes.rawTitle: Browser: add `browser.actionTimeoutMs` and use a 60s default action budget so healthy long browser waits do not fail at the client transport boundary. (#62589) Thanks @andyylin.

changes.title: 浏览器/配置: 支持 per-profile `浏览器.profiles.<name>.headless` overrides 为了 locally launched 浏览器 profiles, so one profile can run headless 不适用 forcing all 浏览器 profiles headless. Thanks @nakamotoliu.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/config: support per-profile `browser.profiles.<name>.headless` overrides for locally launched browser profiles, so one profile can run headless without forcing all browser profiles headless. Thanks @nakamotoliu.

changes.title: Matrix: require full cross-signing identity trust 为了 self-device verification 和 添加 `openclaw matrix verify self` so operators can establish that trust 从 the CLI. (#70401) Thanks @gumadeiras.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: require full cross-signing identity trust for self-device verification and add `openclaw matrix verify self` so operators can establish that trust from the CLI. (#70401) Thanks @gumadeiras.

changes.title: Gradium: 添加 a bundled text-to-speech provider 使用 语音-note 和 telephony output 支持. (#64958) Thanks @LaurentMazare.
changes.rawTitle: Gradium: add a bundled text-to-speech provider with voice-note and telephony output support. (#64958) Thanks @LaurentMazare.

changes.title: 内存-core/hybrid search: expose raw `vectorScore` 和 `textScore` alongside the combined `score` 在 hybrid 内存 search results, so callers can inspect vector-versus-text retrieval contribution 之前 temporal decay 或 MMR reordering. 修复 #68166. (#68286) Thanks @ajfonthemove.
changes.rawTitle: Memory-core/hybrid search: expose raw `vectorScore` and `textScore` alongside the combined `score` on hybrid memory search results, so callers can inspect vector-versus-text retrieval contribution before temporal decay or MMR reordering. Fixes #68166. (#68286) Thanks @ajfonthemove.

changes.title: Dependencies/内存: 停止 installing `node-llama-cpp` 通过 default; local embeddings 现在 load it only 当 operators install the optional runtime package. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies/memory: stop installing `node-llama-cpp` by default; local embeddings now load it only when operators install the optional runtime package. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/DeepSeek: 添加 DeepSeek V4 Flash 和 V4 Pro to the bundled catalog 和 make V4 Flash the onboarding default. Thanks @lsdsjy.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/DeepSeek: add DeepSeek V4 Flash and V4 Pro to the bundled catalog and make V4 Flash the onboarding default. Thanks @lsdsjy.

changes.title: Dependencies/Pi: 更新 bundled Pi packages to `0.70.2`, use Pi's upstream `gpt-5.5` 和 DeepSeek V4 catalog metadata, 和 keep only local `gpt-5.5-pro` forward-compat handling. Thanks @lsdsjy.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies/Pi: update bundled Pi packages to `0.70.2`, use Pi's upstream `gpt-5.5` and DeepSeek V4 catalog metadata, and keep only local `gpt-5.5-pro` forward-compat handling. Thanks @lsdsjy.

changes.title: 模型/CLI: speed up 模型 listing 使用 safe static catalogs 为了 bundled providers, narrower row-source orchestration, 和 less broad registry enumeration 为了 default `openclaw 模型 list`. (#70632, #70883, #70867) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Models/CLI: speed up model listing with safe static catalogs for bundled providers, narrower row-source orchestration, and less broad registry enumeration for default `openclaw models list`. (#70632, #70883, #70867) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 模型/commands: deprecate `/模型 添加` so chat attempts 现在 return a deprecation message 而不是 writing 模型 configuration, 和 移除 the 添加 action 从 `/模型` provider menus. (#71175) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Models/commands: deprecate `/models add` so chat attempts now return a deprecation message instead of writing model configuration, and remove the add action from `/models` provider menus. (#71175) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: 模型/catalog: 添加 manifest-sourced 模型 rows, duplicate provider/模型 conflict reporting, 和 shared `src/模型-catalog` normalization 为了 provider index, cache, onboarding, 和 listing consumers 不适用 loading provider runtime. (#71368, #71360) Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Models/catalog: add manifest-sourced model rows, duplicate provider/model conflict reporting, and shared `src/model-catalog` normalization for provider index, cache, onboarding, and listing consumers without loading provider runtime. (#71368, #71360) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Codex harness/context-engine: run context-engine bootstrap, assembly, post-turn maintenance, 和 engine-owned compaction 在 Codex app-server sessions while keeping native Codex thread state 和 compaction auditable. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/context-engine: run context-engine bootstrap, assembly, post-turn maintenance, and engine-owned compaction in Codex app-server sessions while keeping native Codex thread state and compaction auditable. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Codex runtime plan: consolidate contract-first Pi/Codex parity coverage 和 accept legacy Codex 认证-provider aliases 在 app-server profile login 和 refresh paths. (#71096) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Codex runtime plan: consolidate contract-first Pi/Codex parity coverage and accept legacy Codex auth-provider aliases in app-server profile login and refresh paths. (#71096) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: Codex harness: bridge Codex-native 工具 hooks 进入 OpenClaw 插件 hooks 和 approvals, 使用 bounded relay payloads 和 approval spam protection. (#71008) Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: bridge Codex-native tool hooks into OpenClaw plugin hooks and approvals, with bounded relay payloads and approval spam protection. (#71008) Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/Codex harness: 添加 provider-owned transport/认证/follow-up seams 和 harness result classification so Codex-style runtimes can participate 在 fallback policy 不适用 core special-casing. (#70772) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/Codex harness: add provider-owned transport/auth/follow-up seams and harness result classification so Codex-style runtimes can participate in fallback policy without core special-casing. (#70772) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: 网关/nodes: 添加 disabled-通过-default `网关.nodes.pairing.autoApproveCidrs` 为了 first-time node pairing 从 explicit trusted CIDRs, while keeping operator/浏览器 pairing 和 all upgrade flows manual. 修复 #60800. Thanks @sahilsatralkar.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/nodes: add disabled-by-default `gateway.nodes.pairing.autoApproveCidrs` for first-time node pairing from explicit trusted CIDRs, while keeping operator/browser pairing and all upgrade flows manual. Fixes #60800. Thanks @sahilsatralkar.

changes.title: WebChat/sessions: keep runtime-only prompt context out 的 visible transcript history 和 scrub legacy wrappers 从 session history surfaces. Thanks @91wan.
changes.rawTitle: WebChat/sessions: keep runtime-only prompt context out of visible transcript history and scrub legacy wrappers from session history surfaces. Thanks @91wan.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap: add `agents.defaults.contextInjection: "never"` to disable workspace bootstrap file injection for agents that fully own their prompt lifecycle. (#65006) Thanks @xDarkicex.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/manifest: add a `modelCatalog` contract for provider-owned model rows, aliases, suppression rules, and discovery mode metadata without loading plugin runtime. (#71342) Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/setup: honor explicit `setup.requiresRuntime: false` as a descriptor-only setup contract while keeping omitted values on the legacy setup-api fallback path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/setup: derive generic provider setup choices from descriptor-safe `setup.providers[].authMethods` before falling back to setup runtime. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/setup: surface manifest provider auth choices directly in provider setup flow before falling back to setup runtime or install-catalog choices. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/setup: warn when descriptor-only setup plugins still ship ignored setup runtime entries, keeping `setup.requiresRuntime: false` semantics explicit without breaking existing metadata. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugin hooks: expose first-class run, message, sender, session, and trace correlation fields on message hook contexts and run lifecycle events. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/activation: expose activation plan reasons and a richer plan API so callers can inspect why a plugin was selected while preserving existing id-list activation behavior. (#70943) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's timeout cap from becoming a 1 ms crash loop. Fixes #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Agent/heartbeat: 停止 injecting the heartbeat system prompt 进入 non-heartbeat runs, preventing ordinary user replies 从 being suppressed as `HEARTBEAT_OK` acknowledgments. 修复 #69079. (#69278) Thanks @stainlu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/heartbeat: stop injecting the heartbeat system prompt into non-heartbeat runs, preventing ordinary user replies from being suppressed as `HEARTBEAT_OK` acknowledgments. Fixes #69079. (#69278) Thanks @stainlu.

changes.title: MCP协议: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP协议 runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP协议 startup 当 a runtime 工具 allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP协议 tools, 和 添加 `MCP协议.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction 为了 leaked session runtimes. 修复 #71106, #71110, #70389, 和 #70808.
changes.rawTitle: MCP: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP startup when a runtime tool allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP tools, and add `mcp.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction for leaked session runtimes. Fixes #71106, #71110, #70389, and #70808.

changes.title: 网关/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue 之前 deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work 之后 crashy restarts, 和 fall back to a session-only wake 当 no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue before deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work after crashy restarts, and fall back to a session-only wake when no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

changes.title: Agent/工具-result pruning: harden the 工具-result character estimator 和 context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created 通过 void 或 undefined 工具 handler results, serializing non-string text payloads 为了 size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. 修复 #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-result pruning: harden the tool-result character estimator and context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created by void or undefined tool handler results, serializing non-string text payloads for size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. Fixes #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek.

changes.title: Daemon/service-env: 添加 Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated 网关 service PATHs 在 macOS 和 Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence 和 falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` 当 unset. 修复 #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.
changes.rawTitle: Daemon/service-env: add Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated gateway service PATHs on macOS and Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence and falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` when unset. Fixes #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.

changes.title: 飞书: back off streaming-card creation 之后 HTTP 400 startup failures, so unsupported card setups fall back 不适用 delaying every message. 修复 #56981. Thanks @JinnanDuan.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: back off streaming-card creation after HTTP 400 startup failures, so unsupported card setups fall back without delaying every message. Fixes #56981. Thanks @JinnanDuan.

changes.title: 飞书/topic groups: 密钥 native 飞书/Lark topic-group sessions 通过 `thread_id` so starter messages 和 replies 使用 different `root_id` formats stay 在 the same `group_topic` conversation. 修复 #71438. Thanks @1335848090.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/topic groups: key native Feishu/Lark topic-group sessions by `thread_id` so starter messages and replies with different `root_id` formats stay in the same `group_topic` conversation. Fixes #71438. Thanks @1335848090.

changes.title: 飞书: suppress duplicate final card delivery 当 idle closes a streaming card 之前 the final payload arrives. (#68491) Thanks @MoerAI.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: suppress duplicate final card delivery when idle closes a streaming card before the final payload arrives. (#68491) Thanks @MoerAI.

changes.title: Signal: 保留 sender attachment filenames 和 解决 missing MIME types 从 those filenames, so Linux `Signal-CLI` 语音 notes 不适用 `contentType` still enter audio transcription. 修复 #48614. Thanks @mindfury.
changes.rawTitle: Signal: preserve sender attachment filenames and resolve missing MIME types from those filenames, so Linux `signal-cli` voice notes without `contentType` still enter audio transcription. Fixes #48614. Thanks @mindfury.

changes.title: Telegram/Agent: suppress the phantom "Agent couldn't generate a response" fallback 之后 a reply was already committed through the messaging 工具. (#70623) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/agents: suppress the phantom "Agent couldn't generate a response" fallback after a reply was already committed through the messaging tool. (#70623) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: 模型/CLI: show provider runtime `contextTokens` beside native `contextWindow` 在 `openclaw 模型 list`, 和 align `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.5` 使用 Codex's 272K runtime cap plus 400K native window. 修复 #71403.
changes.rawTitle: Models/CLI: show provider runtime `contextTokens` beside native `contextWindow` in `openclaw models list`, and align `openai-codex/gpt-5.5` with Codex's 272K runtime cap plus 400K native window. Fixes #71403.

changes.title: Dashboard/安全: 避免 writing tokenized Control 界面 URLs 或 SSH hints to runtime logs, keeping 网关 bearer fragments out 的 console-captured logs readable through `logs.tail`. (#70029) Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.
changes.rawTitle: Dashboard/security: avoid writing tokenized Control UI URLs or SSH hints to runtime logs, keeping gateway bearer fragments out of console-captured logs readable through `logs.tail`. (#70029) Thanks @Ziy1-Tan.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: treat DeepSeek refs as cache-TTL eligible 不适用 injecting Anthropic cache-control markers, aligning context pruning 使用 OpenRouter-managed prompt caching. (#51983) Thanks @QuinnH496.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: treat DeepSeek refs as cache-TTL eligible without injecting Anthropic cache-control markers, aligning context pruning with OpenRouter-managed prompt caching. (#51983) Thanks @QuinnH496.

changes.title: Control 界面/浏览器: defer temp-dir access-mode constants until Node-only temp-dir resolution runs, preventing 浏览器 bundles 从 crashing 当 `node:fs` constants are stubbed. (#48930) Thanks @Valentinws.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/browser: defer temp-dir access-mode constants until Node-only temp-dir resolution runs, preventing browser bundles from crashing when `node:fs` constants are stubbed. (#48930) Thanks @Valentinws.

changes.title: Discord/cron: deliver text-only isolated cron 和 heartbeat announce output 从 the canonical final assistant text once, avoiding duplicate Discord posts 当 streamed block payloads 和 the final answer contain the same content. 修复 #71406. Thanks @alexgross21.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/cron: deliver text-only isolated cron and heartbeat announce output from the canonical final assistant text once, avoiding duplicate Discord posts when streamed block payloads and the final answer contain the same content. Fixes #71406. Thanks @alexgross21.

changes.title: macOS 网关: wait 为了 launchd to reload the exited 网关 LaunchAgent 之前 bootstrapping repair fallback, preventing 配置-triggered restarts 从 leaving the service not loaded. 修复 #45178. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: macOS Gateway: wait for launchd to reload the exited Gateway LaunchAgent before bootstrapping repair fallback, preventing config-triggered restarts from leaving the service not loaded. Fixes #45178. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: macOS 网关: tolerate launchctl bootstrap's already-loaded exit 期间 restart fallback 和 use non-killing kickstart 之后 bootstrap, avoiding a second race that can unload the LaunchAgent. 修复 #41934. Thanks @zerone0x.
changes.rawTitle: macOS Gateway: tolerate launchctl bootstrap's already-loaded exit during restart fallback and use non-killing kickstart after bootstrap, avoiding a second race that can unload the LaunchAgent. Fixes #41934. Thanks @zerone0x.

changes.title: macOS 网关: rewrite stale LaunchAgent plists 之前 restart fallback bootstrap, matching install repair behavior 当 `网关 restart` has to re-register launchd. Thanks @maybegeeker.
changes.rawTitle: macOS Gateway: rewrite stale LaunchAgent plists before restart fallback bootstrap, matching install repair behavior when `gateway restart` has to re-register launchd. Thanks @maybegeeker.

changes.title: TTS/hooks: 保留 audio-only TTS transcripts 为了 `message_sending` 和 `message_sent` hooks 不适用 rendering the transcript as a media caption. Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/hooks: preserve audio-only TTS transcripts for `message_sending` and `message_sent` hooks without rendering the transcript as a media caption. Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: WhatsApp/TTS: 保留 `audioAsVoice` through shared media payload sends 和 the WhatsApp outbound adapter, so `[[audio_as_voice]]` reply payloads keep their 语音-note intent 当 routed through `sendPayload`. 修复 #66053. Thanks @masatohoshino.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/TTS: preserve `audioAsVoice` through shared media payload sends and the WhatsApp outbound adapter, so `[[audio_as_voice]]` reply payloads keep their voice-note intent when routed through `sendPayload`. Fixes #66053. Thanks @masatohoshino.

changes.title: Control 界面/WebChat: hide heartbeat prompts, `HEARTBEAT_OK` acknowledgments, 和 internal-only runtime context turns 从 visible chat history while leaving the underlying transcript intact. 修复 #71381. Thanks @gerald1950ggg-ai.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/WebChat: hide heartbeat prompts, `HEARTBEAT_OK` acknowledgments, and internal-only runtime context turns from visible chat history while leaving the underlying transcript intact. Fixes #71381. Thanks @gerald1950ggg-ai.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: keep optimistic user 和 assistant tail messages visible 当 a final history refresh briefly returns an older snapshot, preventing message cards 从 flash-disappearing until the next refresh. 修复 #71371. Thanks @WolvenRA.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep optimistic user and assistant tail messages visible when a final history refresh briefly returns an older snapshot, preventing message cards from flash-disappearing until the next refresh. Fixes #71371. Thanks @WolvenRA.

changes.title: Talk/TTS: 解决 configured extension speech providers 从 the active runtime registry 之前 provider-list discovery, so Talk mode no longer rejects valid 插件 speech providers as unsupported.
changes.rawTitle: Talk/TTS: resolve configured extension speech providers from the active runtime registry before provider-list discovery, so Talk mode no longer rejects valid plugin speech providers as unsupported.

changes.title: Sessions/subagents: 停止 stale ended runs 和 old store-only child reverse links 从 reappearing 在 `childSessions`, while keeping live descendants 和 recently-ended children visible. 修复 #57920.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/subagents: stop stale ended runs and old store-only child reverse links from reappearing in `childSessions`, while keeping live descendants and recently-ended children visible. Fixes #57920.

changes.title: Subagents: recover child sessions 之后 recoverable wait transport failures 不适用 exposing an extra wait state, 和 keep terminal lifecycle timer ordering deterministic. (#71423) Thanks @ZiPengWei.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents: recover child sessions after recoverable wait transport failures without exposing an extra wait state, and keep terminal lifecycle timer ordering deterministic. (#71423) Thanks @ZiPengWei.

changes.title: Subagents: 停止 stale unended runs 从 counting as active 或 pending forever, while preserving restart-aborted recovery 为了 recoverable child sessions. 修复 #71252. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Subagents: stop stale unended runs from counting as active or pending forever, while preserving restart-aborted recovery for recoverable child sessions. Fixes #71252. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 网关/tools: 允许 `POST /tools/invoke` to reach 插件-backed catalog tools such as `浏览器` 当 no core implementation exists, while still preferring built-在 tools 为了 real core names. Thanks @chat2way.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/tools: allow `POST /tools/invoke` to reach plugin-backed catalog tools such as `browser` when no core implementation exists, while still preferring built-in tools for real core names. Thanks @chat2way.

changes.title: 浏览器/安全: require `operator.admin` 为了 the `浏览器.request` 网关 method, matching the host/浏览器-node control authority exposed 通过 that route. Thanks @RichardCao.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/security: require `operator.admin` for the `browser.request` gateway method, matching the host/browser-node control authority exposed by that route. Thanks @RichardCao.

changes.title: 浏览器/profiles: 允许 local managed profiles to override `浏览器.executablePath`, so different profiles can launch different Chromium-based browsers. Thanks @nobrainer-tech.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/profiles: allow local managed profiles to override `browser.executablePath`, so different profiles can launch different Chromium-based browsers. Thanks @nobrainer-tech.

changes.title: Agent/replay: repair displaced 或 missing 工具 results 之前 strict provider replay, use Codex-compatible `aborted` outputs 为了 OpenAI Responses history, 和 drop partial aborted/错误 transport turns 之前 retries.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: repair displaced or missing tool results before strict provider replay, use Codex-compatible `aborted` outputs for OpenAI Responses history, and drop partial aborted/error transport turns before retries.

changes.title: 浏览器/startup: deduplicate concurrent lazy-start calls per profile so simultaneous 浏览器 工具 requests no longer race 进入 duplicate Chrome launches 和 `PortInUseError`. (#61772) Thanks @sukhdeepjohar.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/startup: deduplicate concurrent lazy-start calls per profile so simultaneous browser tool requests no longer race into duplicate Chrome launches and `PortInUseError`. (#61772) Thanks @sukhdeepjohar.

changes.title: 浏览器/profiles: recover 从 stale Chromium `Singleton*` profile locks 之后 crashes 或 host moves 通过 clearing dead/foreign locks 和 retrying launch once. Thanks @seanc-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/profiles: recover from stale Chromium `Singleton*` profile locks after crashes or host moves by clearing dead/foreign locks and retrying launch once. Thanks @seanc-dev.

changes.title: 浏览器/existing-session: keep Chrome MCP协议 status probes transport-only 和 ephemeral, 和 重试 stale cached Playwright attaches once so idle profile checks no longer poison the next real attach. (#57245) Thanks @josephbergvinson.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/existing-session: keep Chrome MCP status probes transport-only and ephemeral, and retry stale cached Playwright attaches once so idle profile checks no longer poison the next real attach. (#57245) Thanks @josephbergvinson.

changes.title: Cron/exec: suppress automatic background exec completion wakes only 为了 silent cron jobs 使用 `delivery.mode="none"` while keeping Webhook 和 announce runs observable. (#71391) Thanks @goldmar.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/exec: suppress automatic background exec completion wakes only for silent cron jobs with `delivery.mode="none"` while keeping webhook and announce runs observable. (#71391) Thanks @goldmar.

changes.title: Reply media: 允许 sandboxed replies to deliver OpenClaw-managed `media/outbound` 和 `media/工具-*` attachments 不适用 treating them as sandbox escapes, while keeping alias-escape checks 在 the managed media root. 修复 #71138. Thanks @mayor686, @truffle-dev, 和 @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Reply media: allow sandboxed replies to deliver OpenClaw-managed `media/outbound` and `media/tool-*` attachments without treating them as sandbox escapes, while keeping alias-escape checks on the managed media root. Fixes #71138. Thanks @mayor686, @truffle-dev, and @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: CLI/Agent: keep `openclaw Agent --json` stdout reserved 为了 the JSON response 通过 routing 网关, 插件, 和 embedded-fallback diagnostics to stderr 之前 execution starts. 修复 #71319.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/agent: keep `openclaw agent --json` stdout reserved for the JSON response by routing gateway, plugin, and embedded-fallback diagnostics to stderr before execution starts. Fixes #71319.

changes.title: Agent/Gemini: 重试 reasoning-only, empty, 和 planning-only Gemini turns 而不是 letting sessions 静默地 stall. 修复 #71074. (#71362) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Gemini: retry reasoning-only, empty, and planning-only Gemini turns instead of letting sessions silently stall. Fixes #71074. (#71362) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Providers/DeepSeek: 添加 missing `reasoning_content` placeholders 为了 replayed assistant 工具-call turns 当 DeepSeek V4 thinking is enabled, so switching an existing session to `deepseek-v4-flash` 或 `deepseek-v4-pro` no longer trips the provider's 400 replay check. 修复 #71372. Thanks @yangyang1719.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/DeepSeek: add missing `reasoning_content` placeholders for replayed assistant tool-call turns when DeepSeek V4 thinking is enabled, so switching an existing session to `deepseek-v4-flash` or `deepseek-v4-pro` no longer trips the provider's 400 replay check. Fixes #71372. Thanks @yangyang1719.

changes.title: Exec approvals: 允许 bare 命令-name allowlist patterns to match 路径-resolved executable basenames 不适用 trusting `./工具` 或 absolute 路径-selected binaries. 修复 #71315. Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code 和 @dengluozhang.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: allow bare command-name allowlist patterns to match PATH-resolved executable basenames without trusting `./tool` or absolute path-selected binaries. Fixes #71315. Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code and @dengluozhang.

changes.title: 配置/recovery: skip whole-file last-known-good rollback 当 invalidity is scoped to `插件.entries.*`, preserving unrelated user settings 期间 插件 schema 或 host-version skew. 修复 #71289. Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Config/recovery: skip whole-file last-known-good rollback when invalidity is scoped to `plugins.entries.*`, preserving unrelated user settings during plugin schema or host-version skew. Fixes #71289. Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Agent/tools: keep resolved reply-run configs 从 being overwritten 通过 stale runtime snapshots, 和 let empty web runtime metadata fall back to configured provider auto-detection so standard 和 queued turns expose the same 工具 set. 修复 #71355. Thanks @c-g14.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: keep resolved reply-run configs from being overwritten by stale runtime snapshots, and let empty web runtime metadata fall back to configured provider auto-detection so standard and queued turns expose the same tool set. Fixes #71355. Thanks @c-g14.

changes.title: Agent/TTS: pass the resolved shared 配置 进入 the `tts` 工具, so 工具-triggered speech uses configured providers 和 voices 而不是 falling back to a fresh 配置 load.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/TTS: pass the resolved shared config into the `tts` tool, so tool-triggered speech uses configured providers and voices instead of falling back to a fresh config load.

changes.title: Reply media: strip `MEDIA:` attachments 从 final replies 当 the same media already went out through block streaming, preventing duplicate Telegram 语音 notes 和 files. 修复 #65468. Thanks @aurora-openclaw.
changes.rawTitle: Reply media: strip `MEDIA:` attachments from final replies when the same media already went out through block streaming, preventing duplicate Telegram voice notes and files. Fixes #65468. Thanks @aurora-openclaw.

changes.title: Agent/TTS: 保留 语音 media 当 a 工具-generated reply is paired 使用 an exact `NO_REPLY` sentinel, stripping the sentinel text 而不是 dropping the audio payload. 修复 #66092.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/TTS: preserve voice media when a tool-generated reply is paired with an exact `NO_REPLY` sentinel, stripping the sentinel text instead of dropping the audio payload. Fixes #66092.

changes.title: Compaction: honor explicit `Agent.defaults.compaction.keepRecentTokens` 为了 manual `/compact`, re-distill safeguard summaries 而不是 snowballing previous summaries, 和 启用 safeguard summary quality checks 通过 default. 修复 #71357. Thanks @WhiteGiverMa.
changes.rawTitle: Compaction: honor explicit `agents.defaults.compaction.keepRecentTokens` for manual `/compact`, re-distill safeguard summaries instead of snowballing previous summaries, and enable safeguard summary quality checks by default. Fixes #71357. Thanks @WhiteGiverMa.

changes.title: Sessions: honor configured `session.maintenance` settings 期间 load-time maintenance 而不是 falling back to default entry caps. 修复 #71356. Thanks @comolago.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions: honor configured `session.maintenance` settings during load-time maintenance instead of falling back to default entry caps. Fixes #71356. Thanks @comolago.

changes.title: 浏览器/sandbox: pass the resolved `浏览器.ssrfPolicy` 进入 sandbox 浏览器 bridges 和 refresh cached bridges 当 the effective policy changes, so sandboxed 浏览器 navigation honors private-network opt-ins. 修复 #45153 和 #57055. Thanks @jzakirov, @zuoanCo, 和 @kybrcore.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/sandbox: pass the resolved `browser.ssrfPolicy` into sandbox browser bridges and refresh cached bridges when the effective policy changes, so sandboxed browser navigation honors private-network opt-ins. Fixes #45153 and #57055. Thanks @jzakirov, @zuoanCo, and @kybrcore.

changes.title: 浏览器/代理: keep 网关/provider 代理 environment variables 从 proxying the OpenClaw-managed 浏览器, so `HTTP_PROXY` 和 `HTTPS_PROXY` no longer block ordinary 浏览器 navigation. 修复 #71358. Thanks @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/proxy: keep Gateway/provider proxy environment variables from proxying the OpenClaw-managed browser, so `HTTP_PROXY` and `HTTPS_PROXY` no longer block ordinary browser navigation. Fixes #71358. Thanks @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: Agent/MCP协议: validate draft-2020-12 MCP协议 工具 output schemas 使用 a draft-aware bundle-MCP协议 client validator, so external MCP协议 servers no longer fail catalog/工具 execution 使用 missing schema refs. 修复 #68772 和 #70196. Thanks @mwiesen.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/MCP: validate draft-2020-12 MCP tool output schemas with a draft-aware bundle-MCP client validator, so external MCP servers no longer fail catalog/tool execution with missing schema refs. Fixes #68772 and #70196. Thanks @mwiesen.

changes.title: Dashboard/Windows: open Control 界面 和 OAuth认证 URLs through the system URL handler 不适用 `cmd.exe` parsing 或 路径-based `rundll32` lookup, 和 reject non-HTTP 浏览器-open inputs. 修复 #71098. Thanks @Sanjays2402.
changes.rawTitle: Dashboard/Windows: open Control UI and OAuth URLs through the system URL handler without `cmd.exe` parsing or PATH-based `rundll32` lookup, and reject non-HTTP browser-open inputs. Fixes #71098. Thanks @Sanjays2402.

changes.title: 配置/诊断工具: reject legacy `secretref-env:<ENV_VAR>` marker strings 在 SecretRef credential paths 和 migrate valid markers to structured env SecretRefs 使用 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`. 修复 #51794. Thanks @halointellicore.
changes.rawTitle: Config/doctor: reject legacy `secretref-env:<ENV_VAR>` marker strings on SecretRef credential paths and migrate valid markers to structured env SecretRefs with `openclaw doctor --fix`. Fixes #51794. Thanks @halointellicore.

changes.title: 插件 SDK/浏览器: export the resolved 浏览器 tab-cleanup 配置 type through the 浏览器 profile facade, keeping SDK subpath contracts aligned.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK/browser: export the resolved browser tab-cleanup config type through the browser profile facade, keeping SDK subpath contracts aligned.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: separate API-密钥 和 Codex sign-在 onboarding groups, 和 避免 replaying stale OpenAI Responses reasoning blocks 之后 a 模型 route switch.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: separate API-key and Codex sign-in onboarding groups, and avoid replaying stale OpenAI Responses reasoning blocks after a model route switch.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: forward `prompt_cache_key` 在 Completions requests only 为了 providers that opt 在 使用 `compat.supportsPromptCacheKey`, keeping default 代理 payloads unchanged. 修复 #69272.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: forward `prompt_cache_key` on Completions requests only for providers that opt in with `compat.supportsPromptCacheKey`, keeping default proxy payloads unchanged. Fixes #69272.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: skip null 或 non-object streaming chunks 从 custom providers 而不是 failing the turn 之后 partial output. 修复 #51112.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: skip null or non-object streaming chunks from custom providers instead of failing the turn after partial output. Fixes #51112.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI-compatible: treat singular MLX-style `finish_reason: "tool_call"` as tool use instead of a provider error. Fixes #61499.

changes.title: Docs/TTS: clarify that legacy flat TTS provider 配置 blocks are repaired 通过 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`, not accepted 通过 strict runtime schema 在 load. 修复 #56220.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/TTS: clarify that legacy flat TTS provider config blocks are repaired by `openclaw doctor --fix`, not accepted by strict runtime schema on load. Fixes #56220.

changes.title: 插件/OpenCode: strip unsupported disabled Responses reasoning payloads 为了 OpenCode image understanding. 修复 #70252.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/OpenCode: strip unsupported disabled Responses reasoning payloads for OpenCode image understanding. Fixes #70252.

changes.title: 插件/OpenCode/OpenCode Go: register image understanding metadata so the image 工具 is available 为了 OpenCode catalog 模型 使用 vision 支持. 修复 #70482 和 #61789.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/OpenCode/OpenCode Go: register image understanding metadata so the image tool is available for OpenCode catalog models with vision support. Fixes #70482 and #61789.

changes.title: 插件/OpenCode Go: 更新 the default Go catalog 模型 to `opencode-go/kimi-k2.6`. Thanks @masrlinu.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/OpenCode Go: update the default Go catalog model to `opencode-go/kimi-k2.6`. Thanks @masrlinu.

changes.title: Providers/ElevenLabs: omit the MP3-only `Accept` header 为了 PCM telephony synthesis, so 语音 Call requests 为了 `pcm_22050` no longer receive MP3 audio. 修复 #67340. Thanks @marcchabot.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/ElevenLabs: omit the MP3-only `Accept` header for PCM telephony synthesis, so Voice Call requests for `pcm_22050` no longer receive MP3 audio. Fixes #67340. Thanks @marcchabot.

changes.title: Providers/MiniMax TTS: truncate fractional pitch overrides 之前 sending T2A requests, matching MiniMax's integer pitch contract while preserving fractional speed 和 volume. 修复 #62144.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/MiniMax TTS: truncate fractional pitch overrides before sending T2A requests, matching MiniMax's integer pitch contract while preserving fractional speed and volume. Fixes #62144.

changes.title: Providers/MiniMax TTS: transcode 语音-note targets to Opus so 飞书/Telegram receive native 语音 messages 而不是 MP3 file attachments. 修复 #63540, #64134, 和 #70445.

changes.title: Control 界面/commands: carry provider-owned thinking 选项 ids/labels 在 session rows 和 defaults so fresh sessions show 和 accept dynamic modes such as `adaptive`, `xhigh`, 和 `max`. 修复 #71269. Thanks @Young-Khalil.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/commands: carry provider-owned thinking option ids/labels in session rows and defaults so fresh sessions show and accept dynamic modes such as `adaptive`, `xhigh`, and `max`. Fixes #71269. Thanks @Young-Khalil.

changes.title: Image generation: make explicit `模型=` overrides exact-only so failed `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` requests no longer fall through to Gemini 或 other configured providers, 和 更新 `image_generate list` to mention OpenAI Codex OAuth认证 as valid 认证 为了 `OpenAI/gpt-image-2`. 修复 #71290 和 #71231. Thanks @Young-Khalil.

Fixes #71290 and #71231. Thanks @Young-Khalil.

changes.title: Providers/GitHub Copilot: keep the 插件 stream wrapper 从 claiming transport selection 之前 OpenClaw picks a boundary-aware stream 路径, avoiding Pi's stale fallback Copilot headers 在 normal 模型 turns.

changes.title: Discord/subagents: pass runtime 配置 进入 thread-bound native subagent binding 和 require it at the helper boundary so Discord channel resolution keeps account-aware 配置. 修复 #71054. (#70945) Thanks @jai.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/subagents: pass runtime config into thread-bound native subagent binding and require it at the helper boundary so Discord channel resolution keeps account-aware config. Fixes #71054. (#70945) Thanks @jai.

changes.title: Slack/Assistant: accept Slack Assistant DM `message_changed` events 当 their metadata identifies the human sender, while continuing to drop self-authored bot edits. 修复 #55445. Thanks @AlfredPros.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/Assistant: accept Slack Assistant DM `message_changed` events when their metadata identifies the human sender, while continuing to drop self-authored bot edits. Fixes #55445. Thanks @AlfredPros.

changes.title: Slack/native streaming: suppress reasoning-only payloads 之前 `chat.startStream`/`appendStream`, so Claude extended-thinking blocks no longer appear as visible Slack messages. 修复 #59687. Thanks @vision-ifc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/native streaming: suppress reasoning-only payloads before `chat.startStream`/`appendStream`, so Claude extended-thinking blocks no longer appear as visible Slack messages. Fixes #59687. Thanks @vision-ifc.

changes.title: Slack/block replies: keep multi-part block deliveries 在 the first Slack reply thread 当 `replyToMode` is `first`, matching text reply threading 而不是 leaking later blocks 进入 the channel. 修复 #49341. Thanks @pholmstr 和 @xiwuqi.

changes.title: Slack/thread broadcasts: process `thread_broadcast` events as user messages so replies sent 使用 "Also send to channel" reach the Agent 而不是 becoming metadata-only system events. 修复 #56605 和 #4351. Thanks @clawSean 和 @jlowin.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/thread broadcasts: process `thread_broadcast` events as user messages so replies sent with "Also send to channel" reach the agent instead of becoming metadata-only system events. Fixes #56605 and #4351. Thanks @clawSean and @jlowin.

changes.title: Slack/threading: ignore internal reply ids 当 choosing Slack `thread_ts` values, so resumed replies keep the real Slack thread anchor 而不是 leaking to the channel root. 修复 #68790. Thanks @MonkeyLeeT 和 @martingarramon.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/threading: ignore internal reply ids when choosing Slack `thread_ts` values, so resumed replies keep the real Slack thread anchor instead of leaking to the channel root. Fixes #68790. Thanks @MonkeyLeeT and @martingarramon.

changes.title: Agent/failover: 停止 body-less HTTP 400/422 代理 failures 从 defaulting to `"format"` classification, so embedded retries surface the opaque provider failure 而不是 falling 进入 a compaction loop. 修复 #66462. (#67024) Thanks @altaywtf 和 @HongzhuLiu.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/failover: stop body-less HTTP 400/422 proxy failures from defaulting to `"format"` classification, so embedded retries surface the opaque provider failure instead of falling into a compaction loop. Fixes #66462. (#67024) Thanks @altaywtf and @HongzhuLiu.

changes.title: 插件/loader: use cached discovery-mode snapshot loads 为了 read-only 插件 capability lookups, keep snapshot caches isolated 从 active 网关 registries, 和 make same-插件 channel/HTTP route re-registration idempotent so repeated snapshot 或 hot-reload paths no longer rerun full 插件 side effects 或 accumulate duplicate surfaces. 修复 #51781, #52031, #54181, 和 #57514. Thanks @livingghost, @okuyam2y, @ShionEria, 和 @bbshih.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: use cached discovery-mode snapshot loads for read-only plugin capability lookups, keep snapshot caches isolated from active Gateway registries, and make same-plugin channel/HTTP route re-registration idempotent so repeated snapshot or hot-reload paths no longer rerun full plugin side effects or accumulate duplicate surfaces. Fixes #51781, #52031, #54181, and #57514. Thanks @livingghost, @okuyam2y, @ShionEria, and @bbshih.

changes.title: 插件/loader: 复用 the compatible active 网关 registry 为了 broad runtime 插件 确保 calls 之后 a 网关-bindable boot load, so non-bundled 插件 no longer re-run `register()` 期间 the same boot 路径. 修复 #69250. Thanks @markthebest12.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: reuse the compatible active Gateway registry for broad runtime plugin ensure calls after a gateway-bindable boot load, so non-bundled plugins no longer re-run `register()` during the same boot path. Fixes #69250. Thanks @markthebest12.

changes.title: 插件/hooks: keep the 网关-bindable hook runner installed 当 later default-mode 插件 loads activate a different registry, preserving 网关 subagent lifecycle hooks across runtime cache misses. 修复 #63166.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: keep the gateway-bindable hook runner installed when later default-mode plugin loads activate a different registry, preserving Gateway subagent lifecycle hooks across runtime cache misses. Fixes #63166.

changes.title: 插件/hooks: refresh live 网关 runtime hooks 之前 inbound channel dispatch, so externally installed 插件 keep `message_received`, `before_dispatch`, 和 reply hooks active 之后 scoped startup 插件 loads. 修复 #71167.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: refresh live Gateway runtime hooks before inbound channel dispatch, so externally installed plugins keep `message_received`, `before_dispatch`, and reply hooks active after scoped startup plugin loads. Fixes #71167.

changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: supervise Carbon's async gateway registration promise so fatal Discord metadata failures surface through startup instead of process-level unhandled rejections. (#62451) Thanks @safzanpirani.

(#71159) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: Codex harness/安全: wait 为了 final app-server approval decisions 和 sanitize approval preview text, so native Codex permission prompts cannot be resolved 通过 an early placeholder decision 或 render unsafe terminal/control content. (#70751, #70569) Thanks @Lucenx9.

items.title: 插件/runtime deps: respect explicit 插件 和 channel disablement 当 repairing bundled runtime dependencies, so 诊断工具 和 health checks no longer install deps 为了 disabled configured channels. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime deps: respect explicit plugin and channel disablement when repairing bundled runtime dependencies, so doctor and health checks no longer install deps for disabled configured channels. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: WhatsApp/插件: 支持 an explicit opt-在 为了 inbound `message_received` hooks 使用 canonical channel, conversation, session, 和 sender fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/plugins: support an explicit opt-in for inbound `message_received` hooks with canonical channel, conversation, session, and sender fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Channels/setup: keep bundled setup entries dependency-light 和 stage WhatsApp runtime dependencies only 当 login actually needs them, so first-run setup 和 read-only channel discovery 避免 unused SDK imports.
items.rawTitle: Channels/setup: keep bundled setup entries dependency-light and stage WhatsApp runtime dependencies only when login actually needs them, so first-run setup and read-only channel discovery avoid unused SDK imports.

items.title: Slack/HTTP: keep Webhook handlers 在 a process-global registry so HTTP mode survives 插件-loader/native-import splits 和 `/Slack/events/<account>` no longer returns 404 之后 logging as active. 修复 #67955, #46245, 和 #46246. Thanks @chrisabad 和 @cesararevalo.
items.rawTitle: Slack/HTTP: keep webhook handlers in a process-global registry so HTTP mode survives plugin-loader/native-import splits and `/slack/events/<account>` no longer returns 404 after logging as active. Fixes #67955, #46245, and #46246. Thanks @chrisabad and @cesararevalo.

items.title: WhatsApp/groups+direct: 设置 `systemPrompt: ""` 在 a specific `groups.<id>` 或 `direct.<peerId>` entry 现在 suppresses the wildcard system prompt 而不是 falling through to it, so users can silence the global prompt 为了 a specific group 或 peer. (#70381) Thanks @Bluetegu.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/groups+direct: setting `systemPrompt: ""` on a specific `groups.<id>` or `direct.<peerId>` entry now suppresses the wildcard system prompt instead of falling through to it, so users can silence the global prompt for a specific group or peer. (#70381) Thanks @Bluetegu.

items.title: Codex harness: send verbose 工具 progress to chat channels 为了 native app-server runs, matching the Pi harness `/verbose 在` 和 `/verbose full` behavior. (#70966) Thanks @jalehman.
items.rawTitle: Codex harness: send verbose tool progress to chat channels for native app-server runs, matching the Pi harness `/verbose on` and `/verbose full` behavior. (#70966) Thanks @jalehman.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: await startup sidecars before channel monitors report ready, reducing Discord and plugin startup races while still keeping gateway boot observability intact.

items.rawTitle: Auto-reply: run inbound reply delivery through `message_sending` hooks so plugins can transform or cancel generated replies before they are sent. (#70118) Thanks @jzakirov.

items.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: make exporter startup restart-safe so config reloads do not retain stale SDKs, log transports, or diagnostic event listeners. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: emit bounded exec-process diagnostics and export them as `openclaw.exec` spans without exposing command text, working directories, or container identifiers. (#70424) Thanks @jlapenna.

items.rawTitle: Diagnostics: emit structured tool execution diagnostic events with trace context, timing, and redacted error metadata. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Sessions: honor configured `session.maintenance` settings during load-time maintenance instead of falling back to default entry caps. Fixes #71356. Thanks @comolago.

items.title: 配置/诊断工具: reject legacy `secretref-env:<ENV_VAR>` marker strings 在 SecretRef credential paths 和 migrate valid markers to structured env SecretRefs 使用 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复`. 修复 #51794. Thanks @halointellicore.
items.rawTitle: Config/doctor: reject legacy `secretref-env:<ENV_VAR>` marker strings on SecretRef credential paths and migrate valid markers to structured env SecretRefs with `openclaw doctor --fix`. Fixes #51794. Thanks @halointellicore.

items.title: 网关/sessions: copy the oversized `sessions.json` to a rotation backup 之前 the atomic rewrite 而不是 renaming the live store away, so a 崩溃 期间 rotation keeps the existing session-to-transcript mapping authoritative. 修复 #68229. Thanks @jjjojoj.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: copy the oversized `sessions.json` to a rotation backup before the atomic rewrite instead of renaming the live store away, so a crash during rotation keeps the existing session-to-transcript mapping authoritative. Fixes #68229. Thanks @jjjojoj.

items.title: Diagnostics/OTEL: export logs through bounded diagnostic log events 而不是 a direct logger transport hook. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Diagnostics/OTEL: export logs through bounded diagnostic log events instead of a direct logger transport hook. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/chat: register chat.send runs 在 the chat run registry so lifecycle 错误 events reach the client 而不是 being 静默地 dropped, fixing stuck 'waiting' state 和 /abort reporting no active run. (#69747) Thanks @wangshu94.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: register chat.send runs in the chat run registry so lifecycle error events reach the client instead of being silently dropped, fixing stuck 'waiting' state and /abort reporting no active run. (#69747) Thanks @wangshu94.

items.title: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's 超时 cap 从 becoming a 1 ms 崩溃 loop. 修复 #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's timeout cap from becoming a 1 ms crash loop. Fixes #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Context engine: keep safeguard compaction checks active 之后 context-engine windowing 和 为了 `ownsCompaction` engines, so large transcripts can compact 之前 prompt submission 而不是 waiting 为了 provider overflow. 修复 #71325.
items.rawTitle: Context engine: keep safeguard compaction checks active after context-engine windowing and for `ownsCompaction` engines, so large transcripts can compact before prompt submission instead of waiting for provider overflow. Fixes #71325.

items.title: Cron/exec: suppress automatic background exec completion wakes only 为了 silent cron jobs 使用 `delivery.mode="none"` while keeping Webhook 和 announce runs observable. (#71391) Thanks @goldmar.
items.rawTitle: Cron/exec: suppress automatic background exec completion wakes only for silent cron jobs with `delivery.mode="none"` while keeping webhook and announce runs observable. (#71391) Thanks @goldmar.

items.title: Reply media: 允许 sandboxed replies to deliver OpenClaw-managed `media/outbound` 和 `media/工具-*` attachments 不适用 treating them as sandbox escapes, while keeping alias-escape checks 在 the managed media root. 修复 #71138. Thanks @mayor686, @truffle-dev, 和 @neeravmakwana.
items.rawTitle: Reply media: allow sandboxed replies to deliver OpenClaw-managed `media/outbound` and `media/tool-*` attachments without treating them as sandbox escapes, while keeping alias-escape checks on the managed media root. Fixes #71138. Thanks @mayor686, @truffle-dev, and @neeravmakwana.

items.title: Exec approvals: 允许 bare 命令-name allowlist patterns to match 路径-resolved executable basenames 不适用 trusting `./工具` 或 absolute 路径-selected binaries. 修复 #71315. Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code 和 @dengluozhang.
items.rawTitle: Exec approvals: allow bare command-name allowlist patterns to match PATH-resolved executable basenames without trusting `./tool` or absolute path-selected binaries. Fixes #71315. Thanks @chen-zhang-cs-code and @dengluozhang.

items.title: Providers/Google: map `/think adaptive` to Gemini dynamic thinking 而不是 a 已修复 medium/high budget, using Gemini 3's provider default 和 Gemini 2.5's `thinkingBudget: -1`. 修复 #71316.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Google: map `/think adaptive` to Gemini dynamic thinking instead of a fixed medium/high budget, using Gemini 3's provider default and Gemini 2.5's `thinkingBudget: -1`. Fixes #71316.

items.title: Control 界面/commands: carry provider-owned thinking 选项 ids/labels 在 session rows 和 defaults so fresh sessions show 和 accept dynamic modes such as `adaptive`, `xhigh`, 和 `max`. 修复 #71269. Thanks @Young-Khalil.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/commands: carry provider-owned thinking option ids/labels in session rows and defaults so fresh sessions show and accept dynamic modes such as `adaptive`, `xhigh`, and `max`. Fixes #71269. Thanks @Young-Khalil.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet joins OpenClaw as a bundled participant plugin, with personal Google auth, Chrome/Twilio realtime sessions, paired-node Chrome support, artifact/attendance exports, and recovery tooling for already-open Meet tabs.

changes.rawTitle: DeepSeek V4 Flash and V4 Pro are in the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, and DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is fixed for follow-up tool-call turns.

changes.rawTitle: Talk, Voice Call, and Google Meet can use realtime voice loops that consult the full OpenClaw agent for deeper tool-backed answers.

changes.rawTitle: Browser automation gets coordinate clicks, longer default action budgets, per-profile headless overrides, and steadier tab reuse/recovery.

changes.title: 插件 和 模型 infrastructure is lighter at startup: static 模型 catalogs, manifest-backed 模型 rows, lazy provider dependencies, 和 external runtime-dependency repair 为了 packaged installs.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin and model infrastructure is lighter at startup: static model catalogs, manifest-backed model rows, lazy provider dependencies, and external runtime-dependency repair for packaged installs.

changes.title: Packaged installs: 保留 package-root runtime dependencies 和 their exported subpaths 当 bundled 插件 runtime mirrors fall back to copying shared chunks, fixing Windows npm updates that could fail to load copied `dist` modules.
changes.rawTitle: Packaged installs: preserve package-root runtime dependencies and their exported subpaths when bundled plugin runtime mirrors fall back to copying shared chunks, fixing Windows npm updates that could fail to load copied `dist` modules.

changes.title: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's 超时 cap 从 becoming a 1 ms 崩溃 loop. 修复 #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's timeout cap from becoming a 1 ms crash loop. Fixes #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Telegram: 移除 the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict 之前 the runner starts. 修复 #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: remove the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict before the runner starts. Fixes #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.rawTitle: Browser/Playwright: ignore benign already-handled route races during guarded navigation so browser-page tasks no longer fail when Playwright tears down a route mid-flight. (#68708) Thanks @Steady-ai.

changes.title: 浏览器/aria snapshots: bind `format=aria` `axN` refs to live DOM nodes through backend DOM ids 当 Playwright is available, so follow-up 浏览器 actions can use those refs 不适用 timing out. (#62434) Thanks @MrKipler.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/aria snapshots: bind `format=aria` `axN` refs to live DOM nodes through backend DOM ids when Playwright is available, so follow-up browser actions can use those refs without timing out. (#62434) Thanks @MrKipler.

changes.title: Telegram: 防止 duplicate 在-process long pollers 为了 the same bot 令牌 和 添加 clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics 为了 external duplicate pollers. 修复 #56230.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: prevent duplicate in-process long pollers for the same bot token and add clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics for external duplicate pollers. Fixes #56230.

changes.title: Sessions/浏览器: close tracked 浏览器 tabs 当 idle, daily, `/new`, 或 `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs 从 leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/browser: close tracked browser tabs when idle, daily, `/new`, or `/reset` session rollover archives the previous transcript, preventing tabs from leaking past the old session. Thanks @jakozloski.

changes.title: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent 令牌 counts 当 cached totals are stale 或 missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh 而不是 cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent token counts when cached totals are stale or missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh instead of cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.

changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level

changes.rawTitle: Agents/replies: recover final-answer text when streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns from surfacing as empty-payload errors. Fixes #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu/TTS: transcode voice-intent MP3 and other audio replies to Ogg/Opus before sending native Feishu audio bubbles, while keeping ordinary MP3 attachments as files. Fixes #61249 and #37868.

changes.title: Telegram/Webhook: acknowledge validated Webhook updates 之前 running bot middleware, keeping slow Agent turns 从 tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. 修复 #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/webhook: acknowledge validated webhook updates before running bot middleware, keeping slow agent turns from tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. Fixes #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.

changes.title: MCP协议: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP协议 runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP协议 startup 当 a runtime 工具 allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP协议 tools, 和 添加 `MCP协议.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction 为了 leaked session runtimes. 修复 #71106, #71110, #70389, 和 #70808.

changes.title: MCP协议/配置 reload: hot-apply `MCP协议.*` changes 通过 disposing cached session MCP协议 runtimes, 和 dispose bundled MCP协议 runtimes 期间 网关 shutdown so removed `MCP协议.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. 修复 #60656.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/config reload: hot-apply `mcp.*` changes by disposing cached session MCP runtimes, and dispose bundled MCP runtimes during gateway shutdown so removed `mcp.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. Fixes #60656.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue before deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work after crashy restarts, and fall back to a session-only wake when no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

(#51267) Thanks @cgdusek, @alvinttang, 和 @coffeexcoin.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tool-result pruning: harden the tool-result character estimator and context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created by void or undefined tool handler results, serializing non-string text payloads for size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. Fixes #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek, @alvinttang, and @coffeexcoin.

items.title: MCP协议/CLI: retire bundled MCP协议 runtimes at the end 的 one-shot `openclaw Agent` 和 `openclaw infer 模型 run` 网关/local executions, so repeated scripted runs do not accumulate stdio MCP协议 child processes. 修复 #71457.
items.rawTitle: MCP/CLI: retire bundled MCP runtimes at the end of one-shot `openclaw agent` and `openclaw infer model run` gateway/local executions, so repeated scripted runs do not accumulate stdio MCP child processes. Fixes #71457.

items.title: MCP协议: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP协议 runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP协议 startup 当 a runtime 工具 allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP协议 tools, 和 添加 `MCP协议.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction 为了 leaked session runtimes. 修复 #71106, #71110, #70389, 和 #70808.
items.rawTitle: MCP: retire one-shot embedded bundled MCP runtimes at run end, skip bundle-MCP startup when a runtime tool allowlist cannot reach bundle-MCP tools, and add `mcp.sessionIdleTtlMs` idle eviction for leaked session runtimes. Fixes #71106, #71110, #70389, and #70808.

items.title: MCP协议/配置 reload: hot-apply `MCP协议.*` changes 通过 disposing cached session MCP协议 runtimes, 和 dispose bundled MCP协议 runtimes 期间 网关 shutdown so removed `MCP协议.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. 修复 #60656.
items.rawTitle: MCP/config reload: hot-apply `mcp.*` changes by disposing cached session MCP runtimes, and dispose bundled MCP runtimes during gateway shutdown so removed `mcp.servers` entries reap child processes promptly. Fixes #60656.

items.title: DeepSeek V4 Flash 和 V4 Pro are 在 the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, 和 DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is 已修复 为了 follow-up 工具-call turns.
items.rawTitle: DeepSeek V4 Flash and V4 Pro are in the bundled catalog, V4 Flash is the onboarding default, and DeepSeek thinking/replay behavior is fixed for follow-up tool-call turns.

items.title: Talk, 语音 Call, 和 Google Meet can use realtime 语音 loops that consult the full OpenClaw Agent 为了 deeper 工具-backed answers.
items.rawTitle: Talk, Voice Call, and Google Meet can use realtime voice loops that consult the full OpenClaw agent for deeper tool-backed answers.

items.title: Agent/工具-result pruning: harden the 工具-result character estimator 和 context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created 通过 void 或 undefined 工具 handler results, serializing non-string text payloads 为了 size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. 修复 #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek, @alvinttang, 和 @coffeexcoin.
items.rawTitle: Agents/tool-result pruning: harden the tool-result character estimator and context-pruning loops against malformed `{ type: "text" }` blocks created by void or undefined tool handler results, serializing non-string text payloads for size accounting so they cannot bypass trimming as zero-sized. Fixes #34979. (#51267) Thanks @cgdusek, @alvinttang, and @coffeexcoin.

items.title: 插件 和 模型 infrastructure is lighter at startup: static 模型 catalogs, manifest-backed 模型 rows, lazy provider dependencies, 和 external runtime-dependency repair 为了 packaged installs.
items.rawTitle: Plugin and model infrastructure is lighter at startup: static model catalogs, manifest-backed model rows, lazy provider dependencies, and external runtime-dependency repair for packaged installs.

items.title: Packaged installs: 保留 package-root runtime dependencies 和 their exported subpaths 当 bundled 插件 runtime mirrors fall back to copying shared chunks, fixing Windows npm updates that could fail to load copied `dist` modules.
items.rawTitle: Packaged installs: preserve package-root runtime dependencies and their exported subpaths when bundled plugin runtime mirrors fall back to copying shared chunks, fixing Windows npm updates that could fail to load copied `dist` modules.

items.title: GitHub Copilot: 保留 encrypted Responses reasoning item IDs 期间 replay so Copilot can validate encrypted reasoning payloads across requests. (#71448) Thanks @a410979729-sys.
items.rawTitle: GitHub Copilot: preserve encrypted Responses reasoning item IDs during replay so Copilot can validate encrypted reasoning payloads across requests. (#71448) Thanks @a410979729-sys.

items.title: Agent/replies: recover final-answer text 当 streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns 从 surfacing as empty-payload errors. 修复 #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.
items.rawTitle: Agents/replies: recover final-answer text when streamed assistant chunks contain only whitespace, preventing completed turns from surfacing as empty-payload errors. Fixes #71454. (#71467) Thanks @Sanjays2402.

items.title: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's 超时 cap 从 becoming a 1 ms 崩溃 loop. 修复 #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat: clamp oversized scheduler delays through the shared safe timer helper, preventing `every` values over Node's timeout cap from becoming a 1 ms crash loop. Fixes #71414. (#71478) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Telegram: 移除 the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict 之前 the runner starts. 修复 #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
items.rawTitle: Telegram: remove the startup persisted-offset `getUpdates` preflight so polling restarts do not self-conflict before the runner starts. Fixes #69304. (#69779) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

items.title: Telegram: 防止 duplicate 在-process long pollers 为了 the same bot 令牌 和 添加 clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics 为了 external duplicate pollers. 修复 #56230.
items.rawTitle: Telegram: prevent duplicate in-process long pollers for the same bot token and add clearer `getUpdates` conflict diagnostics for external duplicate pollers. Fixes #56230.

items.title: 飞书/TTS: transcode 语音-intent MP3 和 other audio replies to Ogg/Opus 之前 sending native 飞书 audio bubbles, while keeping ordinary MP3 attachments as files. 修复 #61249 和 #37868.
items.rawTitle: Feishu/TTS: transcode voice-intent MP3 and other audio replies to Ogg/Opus before sending native Feishu audio bubbles, while keeping ordinary MP3 attachments as files. Fixes #61249 and #37868.

items.title: Telegram/Webhook: acknowledge validated Webhook updates 之前 running bot middleware, keeping slow Agent turns 从 tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. 修复 #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.
items.rawTitle: Telegram/webhook: acknowledge validated webhook updates before running bot middleware, keeping slow agent turns from tripping Telegram delivery retries while preserving per-chat processing lanes. Fixes #71392. Thanks @joelforsberg46-source.

items.title: 网关/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue 之前 deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work 之后 crashy restarts, 和 fall back to a session-only wake 当 no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/restart continuation: durably hand restart continuations to a session-delivery queue before deleting the restart sentinel, recover queued continuation work after crashy restarts, and fall back to a session-only wake when no channel route survives reboot. (#70780) Thanks @fuller-stack-dev.

items.title: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent 令牌 counts 当 cached totals are stale 或 missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh 而不是 cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.
items.rawTitle: Sessions/forking: fall back to transcript-estimated parent token counts when cached totals are stale or missing, so oversized thread forks start fresh instead of cloning the full parent transcript. Thanks @jalehman.

items.title: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level
items.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex: send Codex Responses system prompts through top-level

items.title: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `OpenAI-Codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-API` to the Codex Responses backend 之前 calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. 修复 #71460.
items.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex image generation: canonicalize legacy `openai-codex.baseUrl` values such as `https://chatgpt.com/backend-api` to the Codex Responses backend before calling `gpt-image-2`, matching the chat transport. Fixes #71460.

items.title: Control 界面: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot 为了 context percentage, 和 include cache-write tokens 在 the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. 修复 #47885. Thanks @imwyvern 和 @Ante042.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: make `/usage` use the fresh context snapshot for context percentage, and include cache-write tokens in the Usage overview cache-hit denominator. Fixes #47885. Thanks @imwyvern and @Ante042.

items.title: Daemon/service-env: 添加 Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated 网关 service PATHs 在 macOS 和 Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence 和 falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` 当 unset. 修复 #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.
items.rawTitle: Daemon/service-env: add Nix Home Manager profile bin directories to generated gateway service PATHs on macOS and Linux, honoring `NIX_PROFILES` right-to-left precedence and falling back to `~/.nix-profile/bin` when unset. Fixes #44402. (#59935) Thanks @jerome-benoit.
