changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/realtime: wait for OpenAI session configuration before greeting or forwarding buffered audio, and reject non-allowlisted Twilio callers before stream setup. (#43501) Thanks @forrestblount.

changes.title: ACPX/Codex: 停止 materializing `认证.json` bridge files 为了 Codex ACP, Codex app-server, 和 Codex CLI runs; Codex-owned runtimes 现在 use their normal `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.Codex` 认证 路径 directly.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/Codex: stop materializing `auth.json` bridge files for Codex ACP, Codex app-server, and Codex CLI runs; Codex-owned runtimes now use their normal `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.codex` auth path directly.

changes.title: Auto-reply/system events: route async exec-event completion replies through the persisted session delivery context, so long-running 命令 results return to the originating channel 而不是 being dropped 当 live origin metadata is missing. (#70258) Thanks @wzfukui.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/system events: route async exec-event completion replies through the persisted session delivery context, so long-running command results return to the originating channel instead of being dropped when live origin metadata is missing. (#70258) Thanks @wzfukui.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: extend the webchat session-mutation guard to `sessions.compact` 和 `sessions.compaction.restore`, so `WEBCHAT_UI` clients are rejected 从 compaction-side session mutations consistently 使用 the existing patch/delete guards. (#70716) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: extend the webchat session-mutation guard to `sessions.compact` and `sessions.compaction.restore`, so `WEBCHAT_UI` clients are rejected from compaction-side session mutations consistently with the existing patch/delete guards. (#70716) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: QA channel/安全: reject non-HTTP(S) inbound attachment URLs 之前 media fetch, 和 log rejected schemes so suspicious 或 misconfigured payloads are visible 期间 debugging. (#70708) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA channel/security: reject non-HTTP(S) inbound attachment URLs before media fetch, and log rejected schemes so suspicious or misconfigured payloads are visible during debugging. (#70708) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: link the host OpenClaw package 进入 external 插件 that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only 插件 SDK imports 解决 之后 install 不适用 bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: link the host OpenClaw package into external plugins that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only plugin SDK imports resolve after install without bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.

changes.title: 插件/Windows: refresh the packaged 插件 SDK alias 在 place 期间 bundled runtime dependency repair, so 网关 和 CLI 插件 startup no longer race 在 `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` 之后 same-guest npm updates.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Windows: refresh the packaged plugin SDK alias in place during bundled runtime dependency repair, so gateway and CLI plugin startup no longer race on `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` after same-guest npm updates.

changes.title: Teams/安全: require shared Bot Framework audience tokens to name the configured Teams app via verified `appid` 或 `azp`, blocking cross-bot 令牌 replay 在 the global audience. (#70724) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Teams/security: require shared Bot Framework audience tokens to name the configured Teams app via verified `appid` or `azp`, blocking cross-bot token replay on the global audience. (#70724) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/startup: 解决 bundled 插件 Jiti loads relative to the target 插件 module 而不是 the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: resolve bundled plugin Jiti loads relative to the target plugin module instead of the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.

changes.title: Anthropic/CLI 安全: derive Claude CLI `bypassPermissions` 从 OpenClaw's existing YOLO exec policy, 保留 explicit raw Claude `--permission-mode` overrides, 和 strip malformed permission-mode args 而不是 静默地 falling back to a bypass. (#70723) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Anthropic/CLI security: derive Claude CLI `bypassPermissions` from OpenClaw's existing YOLO exec policy, preserve explicit raw Claude `--permission-mode` overrides, and strip malformed permission-mode args instead of silently falling back to a bypass. (#70723) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/安全: require loopback-only cleartext 网关 connections 在 Android manual 和 scanned routes, so private-LAN 和 link-local `ws://` endpoints 现在 fail closed unless TLS is enabled. (#70722) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Android/security: require loopback-only cleartext gateway connections on Android manual and scanned routes, so private-LAN and link-local `ws://` endpoints now fail closed unless TLS is enabled. (#70722) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Pairing/安全: require private-IP 或 loopback hosts 为了 cleartext mobile pairing, 和 停止 treating `.local` 或 dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pairing/security: require private-IP or loopback hosts for cleartext mobile pairing, and stop treating `.local` or dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/安全: 停止 setup-API lookup 从 falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<插件>/setup-API.*` files cannot be executed 期间 provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: stop setup-api lookup from falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<plugin>/setup-api.*` files cannot be executed during provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Approvals/安全: require explicit chat exec-approval enablement 而不是 auto-enabling approval clients just because approvers 解决 从 配置 或 owner allowlists. (#70715) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/security: require explicit chat exec-approval enablement instead of auto-enabling approval clients just because approvers resolve from config or owner allowlists. (#70715) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/安全: keep native slash-命令 channel policy 从 bypassing configured owner 或 member restrictions, while preserving channel-policy fallback 当 no stricter access rule exists. (#70711) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/security: keep native slash-command channel policy from bypassing configured owner or member restrictions, while preserving channel-policy fallback when no stricter access rule exists. (#70711) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/安全: 停止 `ASK_OPENCLAW` intents 从 auto-sending injected prompts, so external app actions only prefill the draft 而不是 dispatching it immediately. (#70714) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Android/security: stop `ASK_OPENCLAW` intents from auto-sending injected prompts, so external app actions only prefill the draft instead of dispatching it immediately. (#70714) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Secrets/Windows: strip UTF-8 BOMs 从 file-backed secrets 和 keep unavailable ACL checks fail-closed unless trusted file 或 exec providers explicitly opt 进入 `allowInsecurePath`. (#70662) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/Windows: strip UTF-8 BOMs from file-backed secrets and keep unavailable ACL checks fail-closed unless trusted file or exec providers explicitly opt into `allowInsecurePath`. (#70662) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: Agent/image generation: escape ignored override values 在 工具 warnings so parsed `MEDIA:` directives cannot be injected through unsupported 模型 options. (#70710) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/image generation: escape ignored override values in tool warnings so parsed `MEDIA:` directives cannot be injected through unsupported model options. (#70710) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QQBot/安全: require framework 认证 为了 `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot 更改 exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-命令 路径. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/security: require framework auth for `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot change exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-command path. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: MCP协议/tools: 停止 the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge 从 listing 或 invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation 路径 为了 non-owner MCP协议 callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/tools: stop the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge from listing or invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation path for non-owner MCP callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 飞书/onboarding: load 飞书 setup surfaces through a setup-only barrel so first-run setup no longer imports 飞书's Lark SDK 之前 bundled runtime deps are staged. (#70339) Thanks @andrejtr.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/onboarding: load Feishu setup surfaces through a setup-only barrel so first-run setup no longer imports Feishu's Lark SDK before bundled runtime deps are staged. (#70339) Thanks @andrejtr.

changes.title: Approvals/startup: let native approval handlers report ready 之后 网关 认证 while replaying pending approvals 在 the background, so slow 或 failing replay delivery no longer blocks handler startup 或 amplifies reconnect storms.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/startup: let native approval handlers report ready after gateway authentication while replaying pending approvals in the background, so slow or failing replay delivery no longer blocks handler startup or amplifies reconnect storms.

changes.title: WhatsApp/安全: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out 的 the inline message body 和 render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads 在 names, phone fields, 和 location labels/comments.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/security: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out of the inline message body and render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads in names, phone fields, and location labels/comments.

changes.title: Group-chat/安全: keep channel-sourced group names 和 participant labels out 的 inline group system prompts 和 render them through fenced untrusted metadata JSON.
changes.rawTitle: Group-chat/security: keep channel-sourced group names and participant labels out of inline group system prompts and render them through fenced untrusted metadata JSON.

changes.title: Agent/replay: 保留 Kimi-style `functions.<name>:<index>` 工具-call IDs 期间 strict replay sanitization so custom OpenAI-compatible Kimi routes keep multi-turn 工具 use intact. (#70693) Thanks @geri4.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: preserve Kimi-style `functions.<name>:<index>` tool-call IDs during strict replay sanitization so custom OpenAI-compatible Kimi routes keep multi-turn tool use intact. (#70693) Thanks @geri4.

changes.title: Discord/replies: 保留 final reply permission context through outbound delivery so Discord replies keep the same channel/member routing rules at send time.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: preserve final reply permission context through outbound delivery so Discord replies keep the same channel/member routing rules at send time.

changes.title: 插件/startup: restore bundled 插件 `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` resolution 从 packaged installs 和 external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer 崩溃-loop 使用 `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` 之后 missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: restore bundled plugin `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` resolution from packaged installs and external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer crash-loop with `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` after missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.

changes.title: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks 和 trigger/channel context 在 `claude-CLI` turns as 在 direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned 使用 OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, 和 hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks and trigger/channel context on `claude-cli` turns as on direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned with OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, and hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Discord/插件 startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow 和 report import failures 使用 the channel id 和 entry 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/plugin startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow and report import failures with the channel id and entry path.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: keep root durable 内存 canonicalized 在 `内存.md`, 停止 treating lowercase `内存.md` as a runtime fallback, 和 let `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` merge true split-brain root files 进入 `内存.md` 使用 a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: keep root durable memory canonicalized on `MEMORY.md`, stop treating lowercase `memory.md` as a runtime fallback, and let `openclaw doctor --fix` merge true split-brain root files into `MEMORY.md` with a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Providers/Anthropic Vertex: restore ADC-backed 模型 discovery 之后 the lightweight provider-discovery 路径 通过 resolving emitted discovery entries, exposing synthetic 认证 在 bootstrap discovery, 和 honoring copied env snapshots 当 probing the default GCP ADC 路径. 修复 #65715. (#65716) Thanks @feiskyer.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Anthropic Vertex: restore ADC-backed model discovery after the lightweight provider-discovery path by resolving emitted discovery entries, exposing synthetic auth on bootstrap discovery, and honoring copied env snapshots when probing the default GCP ADC path. Fixes #65715. (#65716) Thanks @feiskyer.

changes.title: Codex harness/status: pin embedded harness selection per session, show active non-PI harness ids such as `Codex` 在 `/status`, 和 keep legacy transcripts 在 PI until `/new` 或 `/reset` so 配置 changes cannot hot-switch existing sessions.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/status: pin embedded harness selection per session, show active non-PI harness ids such as `codex` in `/status`, and keep legacy transcripts on PI until `/new` or `/reset` so config changes cannot hot-switch existing sessions.

changes.title: 网关/安全: fail closed 在 Agent-driven `网关 配置.apply`/`配置.patch` runtime edits 通过 allowlisting a narrow set 的 Agent-tunable prompt, 模型, 和 mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) 而不是 relying 在 a hand-maintained denylist 的 protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive 配置 keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: fail closed on agent-driven `gateway config.apply`/`config.patch` runtime edits by allowlisting a narrow set of agent-tunable prompt, model, and mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) instead of relying on a hand-maintained denylist of protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive config keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Webhooks/安全: re-解决 `SecretRef`-backed Webhook route secrets 在 each request so `openclaw secrets reload` revokes the previous secret immediately 而不是 waiting 为了 a 网关 restart. (#70727) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Webhooks/security: re-resolve `SecretRef`-backed webhook route secrets on each request so `openclaw secrets reload` revokes the previous secret immediately instead of waiting for a gateway restart. (#70727) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: decouple the managed dreaming cron 从 heartbeat 通过 running it as an isolated lightweight Agent turn, so dreaming runs even 当 heartbeat is disabled 为了 the default Agent 和 is no longer skipped 通过 `heartbeat.activeHours`. `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates stale main-session dreaming jobs 在 persisted cron configs to the new shape. 修复 #69811, #67397, #68972. (#70737) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: decouple the managed dreaming cron from heartbeat by running it as an isolated lightweight agent turn, so dreaming runs even when heartbeat is disabled for the default agent and is no longer skipped by `heartbeat.activeHours`. `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates stale main-session dreaming jobs in persisted cron configs to the new shape. Fixes #69811, #67397, #68972. (#70737) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Agent/CLI: keep `--Agent` plus `--session-id` lookup scoped to the requested Agent store, so explicit Agent resumes cannot select another Agent's session. (#70985) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/CLI: keep `--agent` plus `--session-id` lookup scoped to the requested agent store, so explicit agent resumes cannot select another agent's session. (#70985) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: 添加 image generation 和 reference-image editing through Codex OAuth认证, so `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` works 不适用 an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. 修复 #70703.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: add image generation and reference-image editing through Codex OAuth, so `openai/gpt-image-2` works without an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. Fixes #70703.

items.title: Providers/OpenRouter: 添加 image generation 和 reference-image editing through `image_generate`, so OpenRouter image 模型 work 使用 `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. 修复 #55066 via #67668. Thanks @notamicrodose.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: add image generation and reference-image editing through `image_generate`, so OpenRouter image models work with `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. Fixes #55066 via #67668. Thanks @notamicrodose.

items.title: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures 之前 logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw 错误 objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.
items.rawTitle: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures before logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw error objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.

items.title: Agent/replay: 停止 OpenAI/Codex transcript replay 从 synthesizing missing 工具 results while still preserving synthetic repair 在 Anthropic, Gemini, 和 Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/replay: stop OpenAI/Codex transcript replay from synthesizing missing tool results while still preserving synthetic repair on Anthropic, Gemini, and Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/WebChat: 保留 image attachments 为了 text-only primary 模型 通过 offloading them as media refs 而不是 dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. 修复 #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/WebChat: preserve image attachments for text-only primary models by offloading them as media refs instead of dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. Fixes #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.

items.title: Codex/media understanding: 支持 `Codex/*` image 模型 through bounded Codex app-server image turns, while keeping `OpenAI-Codex/*` 在 the OpenAI Codex OAuth认证 route 和 validating app-server responses against generated protocol contracts. 修复 #70201.
items.rawTitle: Codex/media understanding: support `codex/*` image models through bounded Codex app-server image turns, while keeping `openai-codex/*` on the OpenAI Codex OAuth route and validating app-server responses against generated protocol contracts. Fixes #70201.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: synthesize the `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.5` OAuth认证 模型 row 当 Codex catalog discovery omits it, so cron 和 subagent runs do not fail 使用 `Unknown 模型` while the account is authenticated.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: synthesize the `openai-codex/gpt-5.5` OAuth model row when Codex catalog discovery omits it, so cron and subagent runs do not fail with `Unknown model` while the account is authenticated.

items.title: 模型/Codex: 保留 Codex provider metadata 当 adding 模型 从 chat 或 CLI commands, so manually added Codex 模型 keep the right 认证 和 routing behavior. (#70820) Thanks @Takhoffman.
items.rawTitle: Models/Codex: preserve Codex provider metadata when adding models from chat or CLI commands, so manually added Codex models keep the right auth and routing behavior. (#70820) Thanks @Takhoffman.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: route `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` through configured Codex OAuth认证 directly 当 an `OpenAI-Codex` profile is active, 而不是 probing `OPENAI_API_KEY` first.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: route `openai/gpt-image-2` through configured Codex OAuth directly when an `openai-codex` profile is active, instead of probing `OPENAI_API_KEY` first.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: harden image generation 认证 routing 和 Codex OAuth认证 response parsing so fallback only applies to public OpenAI API routes 和 bounded SSE results. Thanks @Takhoffman.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: harden image generation auth routing and Codex OAuth response parsing so fallback only applies to public OpenAI API routes and bounded SSE results. Thanks @Takhoffman.

items.title: OpenAI/image generation: send reference-image edits as guarded multipart uploads 而不是 JSON data URLs, restoring complex multi-reference `gpt-image-2` edits. 修复 #70642. Thanks @dashhuang.
items.rawTitle: OpenAI/image generation: send reference-image edits as guarded multipart uploads instead of JSON data URLs, restoring complex multi-reference `gpt-image-2` edits. Fixes #70642. Thanks @dashhuang.

items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: send image-understanding prompts as user text before image parts, restoring non-empty vision responses for OpenRouter multimodal models. Fixes #70410.

items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoints, so trusted LocalAI/LAN `image_generate` routes work without disabling SSRF checks globally. Fixes #62879. Thanks @seitzbg.

items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: stop advertising the removed `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` Codex model through fallback catalogs, and suppress stale rows with a GPT-5.5 recovery hint.

items.title: Agent/transport: 停止 embedded runs 从 lowering the process-wide undici stream timeouts, so slow Gemini image generation 和 other long-running provider requests no longer inherit short run-attempt headers timeouts. 修复 #70423. Thanks @giangthb.

items.title: 内存/CLI: declare the built-在 `local` embedding provider 在 the 内存-core manifest, so standalone `openclaw 内存 status`, `index`, 和 `search` can 解决 local embeddings just like the 网关 runtime. 修复 #70836. (#70873) Thanks @mattznojassist.

items.title: 内存/诊断工具: keep root durable 内存 canonicalized 在 `内存.md`, 停止 treating lowercase `内存.md` as a runtime fallback, 和 let `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` merge true split-brain root files 进入 `内存.md` 使用 a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.title: 内存/dreaming: decouple the managed dreaming cron 从 heartbeat 通过 running it as an isolated lightweight Agent turn, so dreaming runs even 当 heartbeat is disabled 为了 the default Agent 和 is no longer skipped 通过 `heartbeat.activeHours`. `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates stale main-session dreaming jobs 在 persisted cron configs to the new shape. 修复 #69811, #67397, #68972. (#70737) Thanks @jalehman.
items.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: decouple the managed dreaming cron from heartbeat by running it as an isolated lightweight agent turn, so dreaming runs even when heartbeat is disabled for the default agent and is no longer skipped by `heartbeat.activeHours`. `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates stale main-session dreaming jobs in persisted cron configs to the new shape. Fixes #69811, #67397, #68972. (#70737) Thanks @jalehman.

(#70726) Thanks @drobison00.

(#70726) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: WhatsApp: unify outbound media normalization across direct sends 和 auto-replies. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: unify outbound media normalization across direct sends and auto-replies. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: 内存/CLI: declare the built-在 `local` embedding provider 在 the 内存-core manifest, so standalone `openclaw 内存 status`, `index`, 和 `search` can 解决 local embeddings just like the 网关 runtime. 修复 #70836. (#70873) Thanks @mattznojassist.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/CLI: declare the built-in `local` embedding provider in the memory-core manifest, so standalone `openclaw memory status`, `index`, and `search` can resolve local embeddings just like the gateway runtime. Fixes #70836. (#70873) Thanks @mattznojassist.

changes.title: 网关/WebChat: 保留 image attachments 为了 text-only primary 模型 通过 offloading them as media refs 而不是 dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. 修复 #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/WebChat: preserve image attachments for text-only primary models by offloading them as media refs instead of dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. Fixes #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.

changes.title: 插件/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls 在 leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges 当 launch fails, 和 use a flat provider-safe 工具 schema.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls on leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges when launch fails, and use a flat provider-safe tool schema.

changes.title: Media understanding: honor explicit image-模型 configuration 之前 native-vision skips, including `Agent.defaults.imageModel`, `tools.media.image.模型`, 和 provider image defaults such as MiniMax VL 当 the active chat 模型 is text-only. 修复 #47614, #63722, #69171.
changes.rawTitle: Media understanding: honor explicit image-model configuration before native-vision skips, including `agents.defaults.imageModel`, `tools.media.image.models`, and provider image defaults such as MiniMax VL when the active chat model is text-only. Fixes #47614, #63722, #69171.

changes.title: Codex/media understanding: 支持 `Codex/*` image 模型 through bounded Codex app-server image turns, while keeping `OpenAI-Codex/*` 在 the OpenAI Codex OAuth认证 route 和 validating app-server responses against generated protocol contracts. 修复 #70201.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/media understanding: support `codex/*` image models through bounded Codex app-server image turns, while keeping `openai-codex/*` on the OpenAI Codex OAuth route and validating app-server responses against generated protocol contracts. Fixes #70201.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: synthesize the `OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.5` OAuth认证 模型 row 当 Codex catalog discovery omits it, so cron 和 subagent runs do not fail 使用 `Unknown 模型` while the account is authenticated.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: synthesize the `openai-codex/gpt-5.5` OAuth model row when Codex catalog discovery omits it, so cron and subagent runs do not fail with `Unknown model` while the account is authenticated.

changes.title: 模型/Codex: 保留 Codex provider metadata 当 adding 模型 从 chat 或 CLI commands, so manually added Codex 模型 keep the right 认证 和 routing behavior. (#70820) Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Models/Codex: preserve Codex provider metadata when adding models from chat or CLI commands, so manually added Codex models keep the right auth and routing behavior. (#70820) Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: route `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` through configured Codex OAuth认证 directly 当 an `OpenAI-Codex` profile is active, 而不是 probing `OPENAI_API_KEY` first.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: route `openai/gpt-image-2` through configured Codex OAuth directly when an `openai-codex` profile is active, instead of probing `OPENAI_API_KEY` first.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: harden image generation 认证 routing 和 Codex OAuth认证 response parsing so fallback only applies to public OpenAI API routes 和 bounded SSE results. Thanks @Takhoffman.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: harden image generation auth routing and Codex OAuth response parsing so fallback only applies to public OpenAI API routes and bounded SSE results. Thanks @Takhoffman.

changes.title: OpenAI/image generation: send reference-image edits as guarded multipart uploads 而不是 JSON data URLs, restoring complex multi-reference `gpt-image-2` edits. 修复 #70642. Thanks @dashhuang.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/image generation: send reference-image edits as guarded multipart uploads instead of JSON data URLs, restoring complex multi-reference `gpt-image-2` edits. Fixes #70642. Thanks @dashhuang.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: send image-understanding prompts as user text 之前 image parts, restoring non-empty vision responses 为了 OpenRouter multimodal 模型. 修复 #70410.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: send image-understanding prompts as user text before image parts, restoring non-empty vision responses for OpenRouter multimodal models. Fixes #70410.

changes.title: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-在 为了 Gemini image generation requests, so trusted 代理 setups that 解决 Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. 修复 #67216.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for Gemini image generation requests, so trusted proxy setups that resolve Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. Fixes #67216.

changes.title: Agent/transport: 停止 embedded runs 从 lowering the process-wide undici stream timeouts, so slow Gemini image generation 和 other long-running provider requests no longer inherit short run-attempt headers timeouts. 修复 #70423. Thanks @giangthb.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/transport: stop embedded runs from lowering the process-wide undici stream timeouts, so slow Gemini image generation and other long-running provider requests no longer inherit short run-attempt headers timeouts. Fixes #70423. Thanks @giangthb.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: honor the private-network SSRF opt-在 为了 OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoints, so trusted LocalAI/LAN `image_generate` routes work 不适用 disabling SSRF checks globally. 修复 #62879. Thanks @seitzbg.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for OpenAI-compatible image generation endpoints, so trusted LocalAI/LAN `image_generate` routes work without disabling SSRF checks globally. Fixes #62879. Thanks @seitzbg.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: 停止 advertising the removed `gpt-5.3-Codex-spark` Codex 模型 through fallback catalogs, 和 suppress stale rows 使用 a GPT-5.5 recovery hint.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: stop advertising the removed `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` Codex model through fallback catalogs, and suppress stale rows with a GPT-5.5 recovery hint.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: persist assistant-generated images as authenticated managed media 和 accept paired-device tokens 为了 assistant media fetches, so webchat history reloads keep showing generated images. (#70719, #70741) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: persist assistant-generated images as authenticated managed media and accept paired-device tokens for assistant media fetches, so webchat history reloads keep showing generated images. (#70719, #70741) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: queue 停止-button aborts across 网关 reconnects so a disconnected active run is canceled 在 reconnect 而不是 only clearing local 界面 state. (#70673) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: queue Stop-button aborts across Gateway reconnects so a disconnected active run is canceled on reconnect instead of only clearing local UI state. (#70673) Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: 内存/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections 当 startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root 内存 narrows back to `内存.md` 而不是 staying 在 broad workspace markdown indexing.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections when startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root memory narrows back to `MEMORY.md` instead of staying on broad workspace markdown indexing.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: surface selected-模型 capacity failures 从 PI, Codex, 和 auto-reply harness paths 使用 a 模型-switch hint 而不是 the generic empty-response 错误. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: surface selected-model capacity failures from PI, Codex, and auto-reply harness paths with a model-switch hint instead of the generic empty-response error. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/QR: replace legacy `qrcode-terminal` QR rendering 使用 bounded `qrcode-tui` helpers 为了 插件 login/setup flows. (#65969) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/QR: replace legacy `qrcode-terminal` QR rendering with bounded `qrcode-tui` helpers for plugin login/setup flows. (#65969) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 语音-call/realtime: wait 为了 OpenAI session configuration 之前 greeting 或 forwarding buffered audio, 和 reject non-allowlisted Twilio callers 之前 stream setup. (#43501) Thanks @forrestblount.
changes.rawTitle: Voice-call/realtime: wait for OpenAI session configuration before greeting or forwarding buffered audio, and reject non-allowlisted Twilio callers before stream setup. (#43501) Thanks @forrestblount.

changes.title: ACPX/Codex: 停止 materializing `认证.json` bridge files 为了 Codex ACP, Codex app-server, 和 Codex CLI runs; Codex-owned runtimes 现在 use their normal `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.Codex` 认证 路径 directly.
changes.rawTitle: ACPX/Codex: stop materializing `auth.json` bridge files for Codex ACP, Codex app-server, and Codex CLI runs; Codex-owned runtimes now use their normal `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.codex` auth path directly.

changes.title: Auto-reply/system events: route async exec-event completion replies through the persisted session delivery context, so long-running 命令 results return to the originating channel 而不是 being dropped 当 live origin metadata is missing. (#70258) Thanks @wzfukui.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/system events: route async exec-event completion replies through the persisted session delivery context, so long-running command results return to the originating channel instead of being dropped when live origin metadata is missing. (#70258) Thanks @wzfukui.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: extend the webchat session-mutation guard to `sessions.compact` 和 `sessions.compaction.restore`, so `WEBCHAT_UI` clients are rejected 从 compaction-side session mutations consistently 使用 the existing patch/delete guards. (#70716) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: extend the webchat session-mutation guard to `sessions.compact` and `sessions.compaction.restore`, so `WEBCHAT_UI` clients are rejected from compaction-side session mutations consistently with the existing patch/delete guards. (#70716) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: QA channel/安全: reject non-HTTP(S) inbound attachment URLs 之前 media fetch, 和 log rejected schemes so suspicious 或 misconfigured payloads are visible 期间 debugging. (#70708) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA channel/security: reject non-HTTP(S) inbound attachment URLs before media fetch, and log rejected schemes so suspicious or misconfigured payloads are visible during debugging. (#70708) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: link the host OpenClaw package 进入 external 插件 that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only 插件 SDK imports 解决 之后 install 不适用 bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: link the host OpenClaw package into external plugins that declare `openclaw` as a peer dependency, so peer-only plugin SDK imports resolve after install without bundling a duplicate host package. (#70462) Thanks @anishesg.

changes.title: 插件/Windows: refresh the packaged 插件 SDK alias 在 place 期间 bundled runtime dependency repair, so 网关 和 CLI 插件 startup no longer race 在 `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` 之后 same-guest npm updates.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Windows: refresh the packaged plugin SDK alias in place during bundled runtime dependency repair, so gateway and CLI plugin startup no longer race on `ENOTEMPTY`/`EPERM` after same-guest npm updates.

changes.title: Teams/安全: require shared Bot Framework audience tokens to name the configured Teams app via verified `appid` 或 `azp`, blocking cross-bot 令牌 replay 在 the global audience. (#70724) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Teams/security: require shared Bot Framework audience tokens to name the configured Teams app via verified `appid` or `azp`, blocking cross-bot token replay on the global audience. (#70724) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/startup: 解决 bundled 插件 Jiti loads relative to the target 插件 module 而不是 the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: resolve bundled plugin Jiti loads relative to the target plugin module instead of the central loader, so Bun global installs no longer hang while discovering bundled image providers. (#70073) Thanks @yidianyiko.

changes.title: Anthropic/CLI 安全: derive Claude CLI `bypassPermissions` 从 OpenClaw's existing YOLO exec policy, 保留 explicit raw Claude `--permission-mode` overrides, 和 strip malformed permission-mode args 而不是 静默地 falling back to a bypass. (#70723) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Anthropic/CLI security: derive Claude CLI `bypassPermissions` from OpenClaw's existing YOLO exec policy, preserve explicit raw Claude `--permission-mode` overrides, and strip malformed permission-mode args instead of silently falling back to a bypass. (#70723) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/安全: require loopback-only cleartext 网关 connections 在 Android manual 和 scanned routes, so private-LAN 和 link-local `ws://` endpoints 现在 fail closed unless TLS is enabled. (#70722) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Android/security: require loopback-only cleartext gateway connections on Android manual and scanned routes, so private-LAN and link-local `ws://` endpoints now fail closed unless TLS is enabled. (#70722) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Pairing/安全: require private-IP 或 loopback hosts 为了 cleartext mobile pairing, 和 停止 treating `.local` 或 dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Pairing/security: require private-IP or loopback hosts for cleartext mobile pairing, and stop treating `.local` or dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/安全: 停止 setup-API lookup 从 falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<插件>/setup-API.*` files cannot be executed 期间 provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: stop setup-api lookup from falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<plugin>/setup-api.*` files cannot be executed during provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Approvals/安全: require explicit chat exec-approval enablement 而不是 auto-enabling approval clients just because approvers 解决 从 配置 或 owner allowlists. (#70715) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/security: require explicit chat exec-approval enablement instead of auto-enabling approval clients just because approvers resolve from config or owner allowlists. (#70715) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/安全: keep native slash-命令 channel policy 从 bypassing configured owner 或 member restrictions, while preserving channel-policy fallback 当 no stricter access rule exists. (#70711) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/security: keep native slash-command channel policy from bypassing configured owner or member restrictions, while preserving channel-policy fallback when no stricter access rule exists. (#70711) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Android/安全: 停止 `ASK_OPENCLAW` intents 从 auto-sending injected prompts, so external app actions only prefill the draft 而不是 dispatching it immediately. (#70714) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Android/security: stop `ASK_OPENCLAW` intents from auto-sending injected prompts, so external app actions only prefill the draft instead of dispatching it immediately. (#70714) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Secrets/Windows: strip UTF-8 BOMs 从 file-backed secrets 和 keep unavailable ACL checks fail-closed unless trusted file 或 exec providers explicitly opt 进入 `allowInsecurePath`. (#70662) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/Windows: strip UTF-8 BOMs from file-backed secrets and keep unavailable ACL checks fail-closed unless trusted file or exec providers explicitly opt into `allowInsecurePath`. (#70662) Thanks @zhanggpcsu.

changes.title: Agent/image generation: escape ignored override values 在 工具 warnings so parsed `MEDIA:` directives cannot be injected through unsupported 模型 options. (#70710) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/image generation: escape ignored override values in tool warnings so parsed `MEDIA:` directives cannot be injected through unsupported model options. (#70710) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QQBot/安全: require framework 认证 为了 `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot 更改 exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-命令 路径. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot/security: require framework auth for `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot change exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-command path. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: MCP协议/tools: 停止 the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge 从 listing 或 invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation 路径 为了 non-owner MCP协议 callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: MCP/tools: stop the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge from listing or invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation path for non-owner MCP callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 飞书/onboarding: load 飞书 setup surfaces through a setup-only barrel so first-run setup no longer imports 飞书's Lark SDK 之前 bundled runtime deps are staged. (#70339) Thanks @andrejtr.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu/onboarding: load Feishu setup surfaces through a setup-only barrel so first-run setup no longer imports Feishu's Lark SDK before bundled runtime deps are staged. (#70339) Thanks @andrejtr.

changes.title: Approvals/startup: let native approval handlers report ready 之后 网关 认证 while replaying pending approvals 在 the background, so slow 或 failing replay delivery no longer blocks handler startup 或 amplifies reconnect storms.
changes.rawTitle: Approvals/startup: let native approval handlers report ready after gateway authentication while replaying pending approvals in the background, so slow or failing replay delivery no longer blocks handler startup or amplifies reconnect storms.

changes.title: WhatsApp/安全: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out 的 the inline message body 和 render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads 在 names, phone fields, 和 location labels/comments.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/security: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out of the inline message body and render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads in names, phone fields, and location labels/comments.

changes.title: Group-chat/安全: keep channel-sourced group names 和 participant labels out 的 inline group system prompts 和 render them through fenced untrusted metadata JSON.
changes.rawTitle: Group-chat/security: keep channel-sourced group names and participant labels out of inline group system prompts and render them through fenced untrusted metadata JSON.

changes.title: Agent/replay: 保留 Kimi-style `functions.<name>:<index>` 工具-call IDs 期间 strict replay sanitization so custom OpenAI-compatible Kimi routes keep multi-turn 工具 use intact. (#70693) Thanks @geri4.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: preserve Kimi-style `functions.<name>:<index>` tool-call IDs during strict replay sanitization so custom OpenAI-compatible Kimi routes keep multi-turn tool use intact. (#70693) Thanks @geri4.

changes.title: Discord/replies: 保留 final reply permission context through outbound delivery so Discord replies keep the same channel/member routing rules at send time.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: preserve final reply permission context through outbound delivery so Discord replies keep the same channel/member routing rules at send time.

changes.title: 插件/startup: restore bundled 插件 `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` resolution 从 packaged installs 和 external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer 崩溃-loop 使用 `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` 之后 missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/startup: restore bundled plugin `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` resolution from packaged installs and external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer crash-loop with `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` after missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.

changes.title: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks 和 trigger/channel context 在 `claude-CLI` turns as 在 direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned 使用 OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, 和 hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks and trigger/channel context on `claude-cli` turns as on direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned with OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, and hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Discord/插件 startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow 和 report import failures 使用 the channel id 和 entry 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/plugin startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow and report import failures with the channel id and entry path.

changes.title: 内存/诊断工具: keep root durable 内存 canonicalized 在 `内存.md`, 停止 treating lowercase `内存.md` as a runtime fallback, 和 let `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` merge true split-brain root files 进入 `内存.md` 使用 a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/doctor: keep root durable memory canonicalized on `MEMORY.md`, stop treating lowercase `memory.md` as a runtime fallback, and let `openclaw doctor --fix` merge true split-brain root files into `MEMORY.md` with a backup. (#70621) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.title: Providers/Anthropic Vertex: restore ADC-backed 模型 discovery 之后 the lightweight provider-discovery 路径 通过 resolving emitted discovery entries, exposing synthetic 认证 在 bootstrap discovery, 和 honoring copied env snapshots 当 probing the default GCP ADC 路径. 修复 #65715. (#65716) Thanks @feiskyer.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Anthropic Vertex: restore ADC-backed model discovery after the lightweight provider-discovery path by resolving emitted discovery entries, exposing synthetic auth on bootstrap discovery, and honoring copied env snapshots when probing the default GCP ADC path. Fixes #65715. (#65716) Thanks @feiskyer.

changes.title: Codex harness/status: pin embedded harness selection per session, show active non-PI harness ids such as `Codex` 在 `/status`, 和 keep legacy transcripts 在 PI until `/new` 或 `/reset` so 配置 changes cannot hot-switch existing sessions.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/status: pin embedded harness selection per session, show active non-PI harness ids such as `codex` in `/status`, and keep legacy transcripts on PI until `/new` or `/reset` so config changes cannot hot-switch existing sessions.

changes.title: 网关/安全: fail closed 在 Agent-driven `网关 配置.apply`/`配置.patch` runtime edits 通过 allowlisting a narrow set 的 Agent-tunable prompt, 模型, 和 mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) 而不是 relying 在 a hand-maintained denylist 的 protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive 配置 keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: fail closed on agent-driven `gateway config.apply`/`config.patch` runtime edits by allowlisting a narrow set of agent-tunable prompt, model, and mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) instead of relying on a hand-maintained denylist of protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive config keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Webhooks/安全: re-解决 `SecretRef`-backed Webhook route secrets 在 each request so `openclaw secrets reload` revokes the previous secret immediately 而不是 waiting 为了 a 网关 restart. (#70727) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Webhooks/security: re-resolve `SecretRef`-backed webhook route secrets on each request so `openclaw secrets reload` revokes the previous secret immediately instead of waiting for a gateway restart. (#70727) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: 内存/dreaming: decouple the managed dreaming cron 从 heartbeat 通过 running it as an isolated lightweight Agent turn, so dreaming runs even 当 heartbeat is disabled 为了 the default Agent 和 is no longer skipped 通过 `heartbeat.activeHours`. `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates stale main-session dreaming jobs 在 persisted cron configs to the new shape. 修复 #69811, #67397, #68972. (#70737) Thanks @jalehman.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/dreaming: decouple the managed dreaming cron from heartbeat by running it as an isolated lightweight agent turn, so dreaming runs even when heartbeat is disabled for the default agent and is no longer skipped by `heartbeat.activeHours`. `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates stale main-session dreaming jobs in persisted cron configs to the new shape. Fixes #69811, #67397, #68972. (#70737) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: Agent/CLI: keep `--Agent` plus `--session-id` lookup scoped to the requested Agent store, so explicit Agent resumes cannot select another Agent's session. (#70985) Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/CLI: keep `--agent` plus `--session-id` lookup scoped to the requested agent store, so explicit agent resumes cannot select another agent's session. (#70985) Thanks @frankekn.

items.title: Providers/OpenAI: 添加 image generation 和 reference-image editing through Codex OAuth认证, so `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` works 不适用 an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. 修复 #70703.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: add image generation and reference-image editing through Codex OAuth, so `openai/gpt-image-2` works without an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. Fixes #70703.

items.title: Providers/OpenRouter: 添加 image generation 和 reference-image editing through `image_generate`, so OpenRouter image 模型 work 使用 `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. 修复 #55066 via #67668. Thanks @notamicrodose.
items.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: add image generation and reference-image editing through `image_generate`, so OpenRouter image models work with `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. Fixes #55066 via #67668. Thanks @notamicrodose.

items.title: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures 之前 logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw 错误 objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.
items.rawTitle: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures before logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw error objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.

items.title: Agent/replay: 停止 OpenAI/Codex transcript replay 从 synthesizing missing 工具 results while still preserving synthetic repair 在 Anthropic, Gemini, 和 Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon 和 @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/security: stop setup-api lookup from falling back to the launch directory, so workspace-local `extensions/<plugin>/setup-api.*` files cannot be executed during provider setup resolution. (#70718) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: 插件/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls 在 leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges 当 launch fails, 和 use a flat provider-safe 工具 schema.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Google Meet: hang up delegated Twilio calls on leave, clean up Chrome realtime audio bridges when launch fails, and use a flat provider-safe tool schema.

items.title: MCP协议/tools: 停止 the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge 从 listing 或 invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation 路径 为了 non-owner MCP协议 callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: MCP/tools: stop the ACPX OpenClaw tools bridge from listing or invoking owner-only tools such as `cron`, closing a privilege-escalation path for non-owner MCP callers. (#70698) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-在 为了 Gemini image generation requests, so trusted 代理 setups that 解决 Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. 修复 #67216.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Google: honor the private-network SSRF opt-in for Gemini image generation requests, so trusted proxy setups that resolve Google API hosts to private addresses can use `image_generate`. Fixes #67216.

items.title: 内存/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections 当 startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root 内存 narrows back to `内存.md` 而不是 staying 在 broad workspace markdown indexing.
items.rawTitle: Memory/QMD: recreate stale managed QMD collections when startup repair finds the collection name already exists, so root memory narrows back to `MEMORY.md` instead of staying on broad workspace markdown indexing.

items.title: Pairing/安全: require private-IP 或 loopback hosts 为了 cleartext mobile pairing, 和 停止 treating `.local` 或 dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Pairing/security: require private-IP or loopback hosts for cleartext mobile pairing, and stop treating `.local` or dotless hostnames as safe cleartext endpoints. (#70721) Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: QQBot/安全: require framework 认证 为了 `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot 更改 exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-命令 路径. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: QQBot/security: require framework auth for `/bot-approve` so unauthorized QQ senders cannot change exec approval settings through the unauthenticated pre-dispatch slash-command path. (#70706) Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI: 添加 image generation 和 reference-image editing through Codex OAuth认证, so `OpenAI/gpt-image-2` works 不适用 an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. 修复 #70703.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI: add image generation and reference-image editing through Codex OAuth, so `openai/gpt-image-2` works without an `OPENAI_API_KEY`. Fixes #70703.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: 添加 image generation 和 reference-image editing through `image_generate`, so OpenRouter image 模型 work 使用 `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. 修复 #55066 via #67668. Thanks @notamicrodose.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: add image generation and reference-image editing through `image_generate`, so OpenRouter image models work with `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. Fixes #55066 via #67668. Thanks @notamicrodose.

changes.title: Image generation: let Agent request provider-supported quality 和 output format hints, 和 pass OpenAI-specific background, moderation, compression, 和 user hints through the `image_generate` 工具. (#70503) Thanks @ottodeng.
changes.rawTitle: Image generation: let agents request provider-supported quality and output format hints, and pass OpenAI-specific background, moderation, compression, and user hints through the `image_generate` tool. (#70503) Thanks @ottodeng.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: 添加 optional forked context 为了 native `sessions_spawn` runs so Agent can let a child inherit the requester transcript 当 needed, while keeping clean isolated sessions as the default; includes prompt guidance, context-engine hook metadata, docs, 和 QA coverage.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: add optional forked context for native `sessions_spawn` runs so agents can let a child inherit the requester transcript when needed, while keeping clean isolated sessions as the default; includes prompt guidance, context-engine hook metadata, docs, and QA coverage.

changes.title: Agent/tools: 添加 optional per-call `timeoutMs` 支持 为了 image, video, music, 和 TTS generation tools so Agent can extend provider request timeouts only 当 a specific generation needs it.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: add optional per-call `timeoutMs` support for image, video, music, and TTS generation tools so agents can extend provider request timeouts only when a specific generation needs it.

changes.title: 内存/local embeddings: 添加 configurable `memorySearch.local.contextSize` 使用 a 4096 default so local embedding contexts can be tuned 为了 constrained hosts 不适用 patching the 内存 host. (#70544) Thanks @aalekh-sarvam.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/local embeddings: add configurable `memorySearch.local.contextSize` with a 4096 default so local embedding contexts can be tuned for constrained hosts without patching the memory host. (#70544) Thanks @aalekh-sarvam.

changes.title: Dependencies/Pi: 更新 bundled Pi packages to `0.70.0`, use Pi's upstream `gpt-5.5` catalog metadata 为了 OpenAI 和 OpenAI Codex, 和 keep only local `gpt-5.5-pro` forward-compat handling.

changes.title: Codex harness: 添加 structured debug logging 为了 embedded harness selection decisions so `/status` stays simple while 网关 logs explain auto-selection 和 Pi fallback reasons. (#70760) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: add structured debug logging for embedded harness selection decisions so `/status` stays simple while gateway logs explain auto-selection and Pi fallback reasons. (#70760) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/context-engine: redact context-engine assembly failures before logging, so fallback warnings do not serialize raw error objects. (#70809) Thanks @jalehman.

changes.title: WhatsApp/onboarding: keep first-run setup entry loading off the Baileys runtime dependency 路径, so packaged QuickStart installs can show WhatsApp setup 之前 runtime deps are staged. 修复 #70932.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/onboarding: keep first-run setup entry loading off the Baileys runtime dependency path, so packaged QuickStart installs can show WhatsApp setup before runtime deps are staged. Fixes #70932.

changes.title: Block streaming: suppress final assembled text 之后 partial block-delivery aborts 当 the already-sent text chunks exactly cover the final reply, preventing duplicate replies 不适用 dropping unrelated short messages. 修复 #70921.
changes.rawTitle: Block streaming: suppress final assembled text after partial block-delivery aborts when the already-sent text chunks exactly cover the final reply, preventing duplicate replies without dropping unrelated short messages. Fixes #70921.

changes.title: Codex harness/Windows: 解决 npm-installed `Codex.cmd` shims through PATHEXT 之前 starting the native app-server, so `Codex/*` 模型 work 不适用 a manual `.exe` shim. 修复 #70913.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness/Windows: resolve npm-installed `codex.cmd` shims through PATHEXT before starting the native app-server, so `codex/*` models work without a manual `.exe` shim. Fixes #70913.

changes.title: Slack/groups: classify MPIM group DMs as group chat context 和 suppress verbose 工具/plan progress 在 Slack non-DM surfaces, so internal "Working…" traces no longer leak 进入 rooms. 修复 #70912.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/groups: classify MPIM group DMs as group chat context and suppress verbose tool/plan progress on Slack non-DM surfaces, so internal "Working…" traces no longer leak into rooms. Fixes #70912.

changes.title: Agent/replay: 停止 OpenAI/Codex transcript replay 从 synthesizing missing 工具 results while still preserving synthetic repair 在 Anthropic, Gemini, 和 Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/replay: stop OpenAI/Codex transcript replay from synthesizing missing tool results while still preserving synthetic repair on Anthropic, Gemini, and Bedrock transport-owned sessions. (#61556) Thanks @VictorJeon and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/WebChat: surface non-retryable provider failures such as billing, 认证, 和 rate-limit errors 从 the embedded runner 而不是 logging `surface_error` 和 leaving webchat 使用 no rendered 错误. 修复 #70124. (#70848) Thanks @truffle-dev.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/WebChat: surface non-retryable provider failures such as billing, auth, and rate-limit errors from the embedded runner instead of logging `surface_error` and leaving webchat with no rendered error. Fixes #70124. (#70848) Thanks @truffle-dev.

changes.title: WhatsApp: unify outbound media normalization across direct sends 和 auto-replies. Thanks @mcaxtr.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: unify outbound media normalization across direct sends and auto-replies. Thanks @mcaxtr.

changes.title: 网关/WebChat: 保留 image attachments 为了 text-only primary 模型 通过 offloading them as media refs 而不是 dropping them, so configured image tools can still inspect the original file. 修复 #68513, #44276, #51656, #70212.

changes.title: 网关/安全: fail closed 在 Agent-driven `网关 配置.apply`/`配置.patch` runtime edits 通过 allowlisting a narrow set 的 Agent-tunable prompt, 模型, 和 mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) 而不是 relying 在 a hand-maintained denylist 的 protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive 配置 keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/security: fail closed on agent-driven `gateway config.apply`/`config.patch` runtime edits by allowlisting a narrow set of agent-tunable prompt, model, and mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) instead of relying on a hand-maintained denylist of protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive config keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: WhatsApp/安全: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out 的 the inline message body 和 render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads 在 names, phone fields, 和 location labels/comments.
items.rawTitle: WhatsApp/security: keep contact/vCard/location structured-object free text out of the inline message body and render it through fenced untrusted metadata JSON, limiting hidden prompt-injection payloads in names, phone fields, and location labels/comments.

items.title: 插件/startup: restore bundled 插件 `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` resolution 从 packaged installs 和 external runtime-deps stage roots, so Telegram/Discord no longer 崩溃-loop 使用 `Cannot find package 'openclaw'` 之后 missing dependency repair. (#70852) Thanks @simonemacario.

items.title: CLI/Claude: run the same prompt-build hooks 和 trigger/channel context 在 `claude-CLI` turns as 在 direct embedded runs, keeping Claude Code sessions aligned 使用 OpenClaw workspace identity, routing, 和 hook-driven prompt mutations. (#70625) Thanks @mbelinky.

items.rawTitle: Discord/plugin startup: keep subagent hooks lazy behind Discord's channel entry so packaged entry imports stay narrow and report import failures with the channel id and entry path.

items.title: 网关/安全: fail closed 在 Agent-driven `网关 配置.apply`/`配置.patch` runtime edits 通过 allowlisting a narrow set 的 Agent-tunable prompt, 模型, 和 mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) 而不是 relying 在 a hand-maintained denylist 的 protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive 配置 keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/security: fail closed on agent-driven `gateway config.apply`/`config.patch` runtime edits by allowlisting a narrow set of agent-tunable prompt, model, and mention-gating paths (including Telegram topic-level `requireMention`) instead of relying on a hand-maintained denylist of protected subtrees that could miss new sensitive config keys. (#70726) Thanks @drobison00.
